title: "Exp_CH_040726"
author: "Francisco Campos Arguedas"
date: "2026-04-07"
output: html_document

  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r packages}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(data.table)
library(openxlsx)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(ggh4x)
library(dynr)
library(chillR)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(patchwork)
library(ggridges)
library(cowplot)
library(broom)
library(glue)
library(tibble)
library(plyr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(AICcmodavg)
library(dplyr)

```


```{r Importing CH data }


dat_spr=read.csv("/Users/FranCampos/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Cold_hardiness_data_SPRUCE/All_SPR_032826.csv")


#Creating a season and date columns in dataset based on data from column Col & Date
dat_spr$Season=substr(dat_spr$Col,10, 10)
dat_spr$Date <- as.Date(dat_spr$Date, format = "%m/%d/%y")

#### Residuals 

resids <- NULL
for (i in levels(as.factor(dat_spr$Species))){
  sample_id.sub <- subset(dat_spr, Species %in% i)
  
  for (j in levels(as.factor(sample_id.sub$Collection))){
    collection.sub <- subset(sample_id.sub, Collection %in% j)
    
    for (k in levels(as.factor(collection.sub$Treatment))){
      treatment.sub <- subset(collection.sub, Treatment %in% k)
      
      for (l in levels(as.factor(treatment.sub$Plot))){
      plot.sub <- subset(treatment.sub, Plot %in% l)
      
      for (m in levels(as.factor(plot.sub$deacc.days))){
      outlier.test <- subset(plot.sub, deacc.days %in% m)
      
      model <- lm(LTE ~ deacc.days, outlier.test)
      student.resid <- rstudent(model)
      outlier.test.single <- cbind(outlier.test, student.resid)
      resids <- rbind(outlier.test.single, resids)
      }
    }
  }
}
}

rownames(resids) <- NULL
dat_spr_2 <- resids[-(which(resids$student.resid > 2.95 | resids$student.resid < -2.95)),]

# initial.ch.res <- subset(all.peaks.2025, deacc.days %in% 0)


#### Initial CH

#Subsetting initial cold hardiness 
initial.ch <- subset(dat_spr_2, deacc.days %in% 0)

initial.ch <- initial.ch %>%
  mutate(CO2 = case_when(
    Plot == "21" ~ "A",
    Plot == "7" ~ "A",
    Plot == "6" ~ "A",
    Plot == "19" ~ "E",
    Plot == "11" ~ "E",
    Plot == "20" ~ "A",
    Plot == "4" ~ "E",
    Plot == "13" ~ "A",
    Plot == "8" ~ "A",
    Plot == "16" ~ "E",
    Plot == "10" ~ "E",
    Plot == "17" ~ "A",
  ))




initial.ch <- initial.ch %>%
  filter(!(Species == "CHCA" & Sequence == "BJ"))

table(initial.ch$Species, initial.ch$Collection)


# slopes_ic_CHCA_RHGR <- slopes_ic_CHCA_RHGR %>%
#   filter(Sequence != "AF")




#### Verifying CH data looks fine

#Plot is showing ICH per season for 4 years of data. All treatments together with lines. Change species to get their response and own graph.


ggplot()+
  
    geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "A"), Species %in% "LALA"))+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "A"), Species %in% "LALA"), size=0.8, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
  
    geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "B"), Species %in% "LALA"))+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "B"), Species %in% "LALA"), size=0.8, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
  
  geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "LALA"))+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "LALA"), size=0.8, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
  
    geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "D"), Species %in% "LALA"))+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "D"), Species %in% "LALA"), size=0.8, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  
  # facet_wrap(.~Treatment)+
 
  theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, 'lines'),        axis.text.x = element_text(color = c("black"), angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5))+
  
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(as.Date("2021-08-15"), as.Date("2025-05-01")), ylim = c(-50, 0), expand = TRUE, default = FALSE, clip = "on")

str(dat_spr_2)

```


```{r Importing weather data at 2m }

select <- dplyr::select
summarise <- dplyr::summarise
filter <- dplyr::filter
mutate <- dplyr::mutate
rename <- dplyr::rename


#### Weather data at 2m 

wdat_2=read.csv("/Users/FranCampos/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Cold_hardiness_data_SPRUCE/SPR_weather_data_042526_v2.csv")

str(wdat_2)

# temps.hourly <- wdat_2 %>%
#   dplyr::mutate(TIMESTAMP = mdy_hm(TIMESTAMP),   # Convert to date-time
#          Hour = floor_date(TIMESTAMP, unit = "hour"),
#          Treatment = as.factor(Treatment),
#          Plot = as.factor(Plot)) %>%
#   dplyr::group_by(Treatment, Plot, Hour, Season) %>%
#   dplyr::summarise(Temperature = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE))

temps.hourly <- wdat_2 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    TIMESTAMP = parse_date_time(TIMESTAMP, orders = c("m/d/y H:M", "ymd HMS", "ymd HM")),
    Hour = floor_date(TIMESTAMP, unit = "hour"),
    Treatment = as.factor(Treatment),
    Plot = as.factor(Plot)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Treatment, Plot, Hour, Season) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(Temperature = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

str(temps.hourly)


levels(temps.hourly$Treatment)
levels(temps.hourly$Plot)


temps.hourly <- temps.hourly %>%
 mutate(
    Date = as.Date(Hour),
    Hour_of_Day = hour(Hour)
  )

temps.hourly$Location <- "SPR"
temps.hourly$Year <- as.numeric(format(temps.hourly$Date, "%Y"))
temps.hourly$Month <- as.numeric(format(temps.hourly$Date, "%m"))
temps.hourly$Day <- as.numeric(format(temps.hourly$Date, "%d"))


colnames(temps.hourly) <- c("Treatment","Plot","Timestamp","Season","Temp", "Date", "Hour", "Location", "Year", "Month", "Day")


temps.hourly$Dataset <- ifelse(temps.hourly$Month >=7,
                               paste0(temps.hourly$Year, "-", temps.hourly$Year +1),
                               paste0(temps.hourly$Year - 1, "-", temps.hourly$Year))
temps.hourly$Dataset <- as.factor(temps.hourly$Dataset)



# Computing chill portions allowing for plot differences

# wchill_2a <- temps.hourly %>%
#   group_by(Plot, Treatment, Season) %>%  # Group by season, treatment, and plot
#   mutate(portions = Dynamic_Model(Temp)) %>%  # Apply Dynamic Model
#   ungroup()  # Remove grouping to avoid unintended behavior in further operations

wchill_2a <- temps.hourly %>%
  filter(!is.na(Plot), !is.na(Treatment), !is.na(Season), !is.na(Temp)) %>%
  group_by(Plot, Treatment, Season) %>%
  mutate(portions = Dynamic_Model(Temp)) %>%
  ungroup()


# Chill portions graph allowing for plot differences

ggplot() +
    geom_point(data = wchill_2a, aes(x = Date, y = portions, color = as.factor(Treatment)), size=0.5, alpha=0.5) + 
      geom_line(data = wchill_2a, aes(x = Date, y = portions, color = as.factor(Treatment)), size=0.5, alpha=1) +
    facet_grid(. ~Plot, scale="free") +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  # scale_x_date(breaks="months", date_labels = "%b")+
  # xlim(0, 15)+

    # ylim(-40, 0)+
    # xlim(0,20)+
    theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45))



# Computing chill portions having an average per treatment (not taking into account plot)

wchill_2b <- wchill_2a %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date)) %>%  # Ensure Date is in YYYY-MM-DD format
  # group_by(Date, Plot, Treatment, Season) %>%  # Group by Date, Plot, Treatment, and Season
  group_by(Date, Treatment, Season) %>%  # Group by Date, Treatment, and Season, this one makes it per Treatment. 
  dplyr::summarise(
    Start_Chill = first(na.omit(portions)),  # First recorded chill portion of the day
    End_Chill = last(na.omit(portions)),  # Last recorded chill portion of the day
    Daily_Chill = End_Chill - Start_Chill,  # Compute daily accumulation
    .groups = "drop"
  )


#Chill portions graph having an average per treatment (not taking into account plot)

ggplot() +
    geom_point(data = wchill_2b, aes(x = Date, y = End_Chill, color = as.factor(Treatment)), size=0.5, alpha=0.5) + 
      geom_line(data = wchill_2b, aes(x = Date, y = End_Chill, color = as.factor(Treatment)), size=0.5, alpha=1) +
    facet_grid(. ~ Season, scale="free") +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  scale_x_date(breaks="months", date_labels = "%b")+
  # xlim(0, 15)+

    # ylim(-40, 0)+
    # xlim(0,20)+
   theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  # facet_grid(.~Plot)+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, 'lines'),        axis.text.x = element_text(color = c("black"), angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5))



wdat_2b <- temps.hourly %>%
  mutate(Year.Trt = paste(Year, Treatment, Plot, sep = ".")) %>%
  mutate(Date.time = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, format="%m/%d/%y %H:%H")) %>%
mutate(Start.date = as.Date(Date.time, format="%m/%d/%y")) %>%
  group_by(Treatment, Start.date) %>%
mutate(Tmax = max(Temp),
         Tmin = min(Temp),
         Tamp = Tmax-Tmin) %>%
  ungroup()

#Plot is showing Tmin and Tmax per season for 4 years of data. 

ggplot()+
  geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin, color=as.factor(Treatment), fill=as.factor(Treatment)), data = wdat_2b, lty = 1, lwd = 0.1, alpha = 0.3) +

  scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
   theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  # facet_grid(.~Plot)+
  theme(legend.position = "left",
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, 'lines'),        axis.text.x = element_text(color = c("black"), angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5))+
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(as.Date("2021-08-15"), as.Date("2025-12-30")), ylim = c(-50, 50), expand = TRUE, default = FALSE, clip = "on")


```


```{r Importing weather data at 0m }

#### Weather data at 0m 

wdat_0=read.csv("/Users/FranCampos/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Cold_hardiness_data_SPRUCE/SPR_weather_data_042526_TS_0_avg.csv")


temps.hourly0 <- wdat_0 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    TIMESTAMP = parse_date_time(TIMESTAMP, orders = c("m/d/y H:M", "ymd HMS", "ymd HM")),
    Hour = floor_date(TIMESTAMP, unit = "hour"),
    Treatment = as.factor(Treatment),
    Plot = as.factor(Plot)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Treatment, Plot, Hour, Season) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(Temperature = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")


levels(temps.hourly0$Treatment)
levels(temps.hourly0$Plot)


temps.hourly0 <- temps.hourly0 %>%
  mutate(
    Date = as.Date(Hour),
    Hour_of_Day = hour(Hour)
  )

temps.hourly0$Location <- "SPR"
temps.hourly0$Year <- as.numeric(format(temps.hourly0$Date, "%Y"))
temps.hourly0$Month <- as.numeric(format(temps.hourly0$Date, "%m"))
temps.hourly0$Day <- as.numeric(format(temps.hourly0$Date, "%d"))


colnames(temps.hourly0) <- c("Treatment","Plot","Timestamp","Season","Temp", "Date", "Hour", "Location", "Year", "Month", "Day")


temps.hourly0$Dataset <- ifelse(temps.hourly0$Month >=7,
                               paste0(temps.hourly0$Year, "-", temps.hourly0$Year +1),
                               paste0(temps.hourly0$Year - 1, "-", temps.hourly0$Year))
temps.hourly0$Dataset <- as.factor(temps.hourly0$Dataset)



# Computing chill portions allowing for plot differences

# wchill_0a <- temps.hourly0 %>%
#   group_by(Plot, Treatment, Season) %>%  # Group by season, treatment, and plot
#   mutate(portions = Dynamic_Model(Temp)) %>%  # Apply Dynamic Model
#   ungroup()  # Remove grouping to avoid unintended behavior in further operations


wchill_0a <- temps.hourly0 %>%
  filter(!is.na(Plot), !is.na(Treatment), !is.na(Season), !is.na(Temp)) %>%
  group_by(Plot, Treatment, Season) %>%
  mutate(portions = Dynamic_Model(Temp)) %>%
  ungroup()


# Chill portions graph allowing for plot differences

ggplot() +
    geom_point(data = wchill_0a, aes(x = Date, y = portions, color = as.factor(Treatment)), size=0.5, alpha=0.5) + 
      geom_line(data = wchill_0a, aes(x = Date, y = portions, color = as.factor(Treatment)), size=0.5, alpha=1) +
    facet_grid(. ~Plot, scale="free") +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  # scale_x_date(breaks="months", date_labels = "%b")+
  # xlim(0, 15)+

    # ylim(-40, 0)+
    # xlim(0,20)+
    theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45))



# Computing chill portions having an average per treatment (not taking into account plot)

wchill_0b <- wchill_0a %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date)) %>%  # Ensure Date is in YYYY-MM-DD format
  # group_by(Date, Plot, Treatment, Season) %>%  # Group by Date, Plot, Treatment, and Season
  group_by(Date, Treatment, Season) %>%  # Group by Date, Treatment, and Season, this one makes it per Treatment. 
  summarise(
    Start_Chill = first(na.omit(portions)),  # First recorded chill portion of the day
    End_Chill = last(na.omit(portions)),  # Last recorded chill portion of the day
    Daily_Chill = End_Chill - Start_Chill,  # Compute daily accumulation
    .groups = "drop"
  )


#Chill portions graph having an average per treatment (not taking into account plot)


ggplot() +
    geom_point(data = wchill_0b, aes(x = Date, y = End_Chill, color = as.factor(Treatment)), size=0.5, alpha=0.5) + 
      geom_line(data = wchill_0b, aes(x = Date, y = End_Chill, color = as.factor(Treatment)), size=0.5, alpha=1) +
    facet_grid(. ~ Season, scale="free") +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  scale_x_date(breaks="months", date_labels = "%b")+
  # xlim(0, 15)+

    # ylim(-40, 0)+
    # xlim(0,20)+
    theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45))




wdat_0b <- temps.hourly0 %>%
  mutate(Year.Trt = paste(Year, Treatment, Plot, sep = ".")) %>%
  mutate(Date.time = as.POSIXct(Timestamp, format="%m/%d/%y %H:%H")) %>%
mutate(Start.date = as.Date(Date.time, format="%m/%d/%y")) %>%
  group_by(Treatment, Start.date) %>%
mutate(Tmax = max(Temp),
         Tmin = min(Temp),
         Tamp = Tmax-Tmin) %>%
  ungroup()



#Plot is showing Tmin and Tmax per season for 4 years of data. 

ggplot()+
  geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin, color=as.factor(Treatment), fill=as.factor(Treatment)), data = wdat_0b, lty = 1, lwd = 0.1, alpha = 0.3) +

  scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
   theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  # facet_grid(.~Plot)+
  theme(legend.position = "left",
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, 'lines'),        axis.text.x = element_text(color = c("black"), angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5))+
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(as.Date("2021-08-15"), as.Date("2025-12-30")), ylim = c(-50, 50), expand = TRUE, default = FALSE, clip = "on")



```


```{r Temperature correction}

# --- 1) Collection mapping (from your list) ---
date_mapping <- list(
  AA = "2021-09-21", AB = "2021-10-23", AC = "2021-11-21", AD = "2021-12-29",
  AE = "2022-01-29", AF = "2022-03-01", AG = "2022-03-19", AH = "2022-04-09",
  AI = "2022-05-07", BA = "2022-08-19", BB = "2022-09-18", BC = "2022-10-15",
  BD = "2022-11-08", BE = "2022-12-03", BF = "2023-01-18", BG = "2023-02-15",
  BH = "2023-03-15", BI = "2023-04-05", BJ = "2023-04-27", BK = "2023-05-11",
  CA = "2023-08-22", CB = "2023-09-21", CC = "2023-10-10", CD = "2023-10-24",
  CE = "2023-11-08", CF = "2023-11-19", CG = "2023-12-05", CH = "2024-01-05",
  CI = "2024-01-23", CJ = "2024-02-08", CK = "2024-02-24", CL = "2024-03-06",
  CM = "2024-03-14", CN = "2024-03-28", CO = "2024-04-02", CP = "2024-04-18",
  DA = "2024-08-12", DB = "2024-09-11", DC = "2024-09-27", DD = "2024-10-17",
  DE = "2024-10-31", DF = "2024-11-07", DG = "2024-11-20", DH = "2024-12-07", 
  DI = "2024-12-19", DJ = "2025-01-18", DK = "2025-02-02", DL = "2025-02-26",
  DM = "2025-03-01", DN = "2025-03-13", DO = "2025-03-26", DP = "2025-04-09",
  DQ = "2025-04-19", DR = "2025-05-21")


collections_tbl <- enframe(unlist(date_mapping), 
                            name = "Collection", 
                            value = "Collection_Date") %>%
  mutate(
    Collection_Date = as.Date(Collection_Date),
    # Season labels: 2022 = 2021-07-01..2022-06-30; 2023 = 2022-07-01..2023-06-30; etc.
    Season = if_else(month(Collection_Date) <= 6, year(Collection_Date), year(Collection_Date) + 1),
    # Season start is July 1 of the previous calendar year of the Season label
    Season_Start = as.Date(paste0(Season - 1, "-08-01"))
  )



# --- Results containers ---
Mean2m_list <- vector("list", nrow(collections_tbl))
Mean0m_list <- vector("list", nrow(collections_tbl))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(collections_tbl))) {
  
  coll_code    <- collections_tbl$Collection[i]
  coll_date    <- collections_tbl$Collection_Date[i]
  season_lab   <- collections_tbl$Season[i]
  season_start <- collections_tbl$Season_Start[i]
  
  #2m
  slice_2m <- wdat_2b %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Date = as.Date(Date)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(Date >= season_start, Date <= coll_date)
  
  means_2m <- slice_2m %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Plot, Treatment) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(Mean_Temp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Season = season_lab, Collection = coll_code)
  
  ref_2m <- means_2m %>%
    dplyr::filter(as.character(Treatment) == "-2.25",
                  as.character(Plot) %in% c("21", "7")) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(ref_temp = mean(Mean_Temp, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  ref_val_2m <- if (nrow(ref_2m) == 0 || is.nan(ref_2m$ref_temp)) NA_real_ else ref_2m$ref_temp[1]
  
  Mean2m_list[[i]] <- means_2m %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Height      = "2m",
      ref_temp    = ref_val_2m,
      Delta_Temp  = Mean_Temp - ref_val_2m,
      Corrected_T = Delta_Temp
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(Season, Collection, Height, Plot, Treatment,
                  Mean_Temp, ref_temp, Delta_Temp, Corrected_T)
  
  #0m
  slice_0m <- wdat_0b %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Date = as.Date(Date)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(Date >= season_start, Date <= coll_date)
  
  means_0m <- slice_0m %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Plot, Treatment) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(Mean_Temp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Season = season_lab, Collection = coll_code)
  
  ref_0m <- means_0m %>%
    dplyr::filter(as.character(Treatment) == "-2.25",
                  as.character(Plot) %in% c("7", "21")) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(ref_temp = mean(Mean_Temp, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  ref_val_0m <- if (nrow(ref_0m) == 0 || is.nan(ref_0m$ref_temp)) NA_real_ else ref_0m$ref_temp[1]
  
  Mean0m_list[[i]] <- means_0m %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Height      = "0m",
      ref_temp    = ref_val_0m,
      Delta_Temp  = Mean_Temp - ref_val_0m,
      Corrected_T = Delta_Temp
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(Season, Collection, Height, Plot, Treatment,
                  Mean_Temp, ref_temp, Delta_Temp, Corrected_T)
  
  cat("Processed collection", coll_code, "(", i, "of", nrow(collections_tbl), ")\n")
}

#Bind results
Mean2m_coll <- bind_rows(Mean2m_list)
Mean0m_coll <- bind_rows(Mean0m_list)

Mean_all_collections <- bind_rows(Mean2m_coll, Mean0m_coll) %>%
  arrange(Season, Collection, Height, Plot, Treatment)

Mean2m_coll<-Mean2m_coll %>%
      rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_2m"), 
                  .cols = c(Mean_Temp, ref_temp, Delta_Temp, Corrected_T))
str(Mean2m_coll)


Mean2m_coll <- Mean2m_coll %>%
  dplyr::rename("Sequence" = "Collection")

str(Mean2m_coll)


Mean0m_coll<-Mean0m_coll %>%
      rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_0m"), 
                  .cols = c(Mean_Temp, ref_temp, Delta_Temp, Corrected_T))
    
Mean0m_coll<-Mean0m_coll %>%
  dplyr::rename("Sequence" = "Collection")


str(Mean0m_coll)

str(initial.ch)


# library(dplyr)

# Ensure matching key columns have the same type
initial.ch <- initial.ch %>%
  mutate(
    Plot = as.character(Plot),
    Sequence = as.character(Sequence),
    Treatment = as.character(Treatment)
  )

Mean2m_coll <- Mean2m_coll %>%
  mutate(
    Plot = as.character(Plot),
    Sequence = as.character(Sequence),
    Treatment = as.character(Treatment)
  )

Mean0m_coll <- Mean0m_coll %>%
  mutate(
    Plot = as.character(Plot),
    Sequence = as.character(Sequence),
    Treatment = as.character(Treatment)
  )

# Select only relevant columns from Mean2m_coll and Mean0m_coll
# Mean2m_sel <- Mean2m_coll %>%
#   select(Plot, Sequence, Treatment, 
#          Mean_Temp_2m, ref_temp_2m, Delta_Temp_2m, Corrected_T_2m)

Mean2m_sel <- Mean2m_coll %>%
  dplyr::select(Plot, Sequence, Treatment, 
                Mean_Temp_2m, ref_temp_2m, Delta_Temp_2m, Corrected_T_2m)

Mean0m_sel <- Mean0m_coll %>%
  dplyr::select(Plot, Sequence, Treatment, 
         Mean_Temp_0m, ref_temp_0m, Delta_Temp_0m, Corrected_T_0m)

# Merge step 1: add 2m columns
merged_data <- initial.ch %>%
  left_join(Mean2m_sel, by = c("Plot", "Sequence", "Treatment"))

# Merge step 2: add 0m columns
merged_data <- merged_data %>%
  left_join(Mean0m_sel, by = c("Plot", "Sequence", "Treatment"))

# Check structure
str(merged_data)

subset_data <- merged_data %>%
  filter(Species %in% c("LALA", "PIMA", "RHGR", "CHCA"))

str(subset_data)

initial.ch2 <- subset_data

 
```


```{r Delta t vs Corrected T }


str(Mean_all_collections)

# filter out -2.25 for the smooth 
Mean_all_collections_2  <- Mean_all_collections  %>% filter(Treatment != "-2.25")

levels(Mean_all_collections$Treatment)
levels(Mean_all_collections$Plot)


Mean_all_collections_summary <- Mean_all_collections %>%
  group_by(Season, Collection, Height, Treatment) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_Temp    = mean(Mean_Temp, na.rm = TRUE),
    ref_temp     = mean(ref_temp, na.rm = TRUE),
    Delta_Temp   = mean(Delta_Temp, na.rm = TRUE),
    Corrected_T  = mean(Corrected_T, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


Mean_all_collections_summary_2  <- Mean_all_collections_summary  %>% filter(Treatment != "-2.25")




plot_deltaT <- ggplot() +
  
  annotate("segment",
         x = 0, xend = 9,
         y = 0, yend = 9,
         lty = 2, linewidth = 0.5, color = "gray30")+

  geom_smooth(data = Mean_all_collections_2,
              aes(x = as.numeric(as.character(Treatment)), y = Corrected_T, group = Collection),
              linewidth = 0.1, method = "lm", se = FALSE,
              color = "gray80",
              fullrange = FALSE) +
  
  geom_point(data = Mean_all_collections,
           aes(x = as.numeric(as.character(Treatment)), y = Corrected_T,
               fill = Treatment, group = Collection),
           size = 1.2, stroke = 0.1, alpha = 0.6, shape = 21, color = "gray10")+

  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"),
                     labels = c("Amb", "0", "2.25", "4.5", "6.75", "9")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"),
                    labels  = c("Amb", "0", "2.25", "4.5", "6.75", "9")) +
  
  
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(-2.25, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9, 11.25),
                     labels = c("-2.25", "0.0", "2.25", "4.5", "6.75", "9.0","11.25"),
                     expand = c(0.1, 0.1),
                     guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")) +
  

  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-2.25, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9),
                     labels = c("Amb", "0.0", "2.25", "4.5", "6.75", "9.0"),
                     expand = c(0.1, 0.1),
                     guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")) +
  
    labs(
    x = expression(paste("Target temperature (", Delta, italic("T"), ", °C)")),
    y = expression(paste("Plot temperature (", Delta, italic("T"), ", °C)"))
  ) +
  
  

  facet_grid(.~Height)+
  
  # labs(
  #   title = "",
  #   x     = "Target ΔT (°C)",
  #   y     = "Corrected ΔT (°C)"
  # ) +
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    legend.key.size   = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_blank(),
    strip.background  = element_rect(fill = "#F0F0F0", color = "#CCCCCC"),
    strip.text        = element_text(size = 6, face = "bold"),
    axis.line.x       = element_line(linewidth = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y       = element_line(linewidth = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.ticks        = element_line(linewidth = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 6),
    panel.spacing     = unit(1.0, "lines")
  )

plot_deltaT



# ggsave("Fig_deltaT_v4_all_v4.pdf", plot=plot_deltaT, width=4.0, height=2.2, units ="in", bg = "transparent", dpi = 300, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")


range_summary <- Mean_all_collections_summary_2 %>%
  # filter(Treatment %in% c("0", "9")) %>%
  group_by(Height, Season, Collection) %>%
  summarise(
    min_Corrected_T = min(Corrected_T, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_Corrected_T = max(Corrected_T, na.rm = TRUE),
    range_Corrected_T = max(Corrected_T, na.rm = TRUE) - min(Corrected_T, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

View(range_summary)  
# print(range_summary)
```
