```{r Figure 2 and Figure S4}

# --- 0) Helper: Season letter <-> numeric mapping
season_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Season_letter, ~Season_num,
  "A", 2022,
  "B", 2023,
  "C", 2024,
  "D", 2025
)

# --- 1) Start from your Mean_all_collections (built earlier)

# Add Season letters for joining to initial.ch
temps_all <- Mean_all_collections %>%
  inner_join(season_map, by = c("Season" = "Season_num")) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Season_chr = Season_letter) %>%
  # Keep a clean join key set
  dplyr::mutate(
    Treatment_chr = as.character(Treatment),
    Plot_chr      = as.character(Plot),
    Sequence      = Collection         # your initial.ch uses "Sequence" = AA..DQ etc.
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(Season_chr, Sequence, Height, Plot_chr, Treatment_chr,
         Mean_Temp, ref_temp, Corrected_T)

# Split by height and make TWO flavors:
#   (a) Plot-level     (keeps Plot)
#   (b) Treatment-only (averaged across plots; no Plot key)
temps_2m_plot <- temps_all %>%
  filter(Height == "2m") %>%
  dplyr::select(-Height) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Corrected_T_2m = Corrected_T, ref_temp_2m = ref_temp)
str(temps_2m_plot)

temps_2m_trt  <- temps_2m_plot %>%
  group_by(Season_chr, Sequence, Treatment_chr, Plot_chr) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Corrected_T_2m = mean(Corrected_T_2m, na.rm = TRUE),
    ref_temp_2m    = mean(ref_temp_2m,    na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
str(temps_2m_trt)

temps_0m_plot <- temps_all %>%
  filter(Height == "0m") %>%
  dplyr::select(-Height) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Corrected_T_0m = Corrected_T, ref_temp_0m = ref_temp)
str(temps_0m_plot)


temps_0m_trt  <- temps_0m_plot %>%
  group_by(Season_chr, Sequence, Treatment_chr, Plot_chr) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Corrected_T_0m = mean(Corrected_T_0m, na.rm = TRUE),
    ref_temp_0m    = mean(ref_temp_0m,    na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
str(temps_0m_trt)


# --- 2) Prepare initial.ch keys
initial_keys <- initial.ch %>%
  mutate(
    Season_chr    = as.character(Season),          # "A"/"B"/"C"/"D"
    Sequence      = as.character(Sequence),        # two-letter like "DM"
    Treatment_chr = as.character(Treatment),
    Plot_chr      = dplyr::na_if(trimws(Plot), ""),# empty "" -> NA for joining logic
  )

str(initial_keys)


# --- 3) LEFT JOIN with plot-level temps first, then treatment-level fallback
initial_joined <- initial_keys %>%
  # 2m joins
  left_join(
    temps_2m_plot,
    by = c("Season_chr", "Sequence", "Treatment_chr", "Plot_chr")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    temps_2m_trt,
    by = c("Season_chr", "Sequence", "Treatment_chr","Plot_chr"),
    suffix = c("_plot2m", "_trt2m")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Corrected_T_2m = dplyr::coalesce(Corrected_T_2m_plot2m, Corrected_T_2m_trt2m),
    ref_temp_2m    = dplyr::coalesce(ref_temp_2m_plot2m,    ref_temp_2m_trt2m)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-ends_with("_plot2m"), -ends_with("_trt2m")) %>%

  # 0m joins
  left_join(
    temps_0m_plot,
    by = c("Season_chr", "Sequence", "Treatment_chr", "Plot_chr")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    temps_0m_trt,
    by = c("Season_chr", "Sequence", "Treatment_chr","Plot_chr"),
    suffix = c("_plot0m", "_trt0m")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Corrected_T_0m = dplyr::coalesce(Corrected_T_0m_plot0m, Corrected_T_0m_trt0m),
    ref_temp_0m    = dplyr::coalesce(ref_temp_0m_plot0m,    ref_temp_0m_trt0m)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-ends_with("_plot0m"), -ends_with("_trt0m"))


str(initial_joined)

# --- 4) Optional: keep your legacy Corrected_T columns or replace them

initial.ch_joined <- initial_joined %>%
  mutate(
    Corrected_T_for_plot = dplyr::coalesce(Corrected_T_2m, Corrected_T_0m)
  )

##### Run this to get equations
{ library(ggpmisc)
library(ggpubr)
set.seed(7)
n <- 10
x <- runif(n, 0, 100)
mu <- (1 - exp(-.1 * x)) + 10
set.seed(5)
y <- rnorm(n, mu, .05)
d <- data.frame(x, y, mu)
my.formula <- y ~ x

### True model ###

qplot(x, mu, geom = "line") + theme_bw()

### Sampled data from true model ###

qplot(x, y) + theme_bw()

### fit straight line to data ###

poly1.formula <- y ~ x
    ggplot(d, aes(x = x, y = y)) + geom_point() + theme_bw() +
      stat_smooth(method = "lm", se = F, formula="y~x") +
     stat_poly_eq(formula = poly1.formula,
                  eq.with.lhs = "italic(hat(y))~`=`~",
                  aes(label = paste(..eq.label.., ..rr.label.., adj.rr.label, sep = "~~~")), 
                  parse = TRUE,
                  label.y = "bottom", label.x = "right")


### fit quadratic ###

poly2.formula <- y ~ poly(x,2)
    ggplot(d, aes(x = x, y = y)) + geom_point() + theme_bw() +
      stat_smooth(method = "lm", se = F, formula = poly2.formula) +
     stat_poly_eq(formula = poly2.formula,
                  eq.with.lhs = "italic(hat(y))~`=`~",
                  aes(label = paste(..eq.label.., ..rr.label.., adj.rr.label, sep = "~~~")), 
                  parse = TRUE,
                  label.y = "bottom")


  }


# SECTION 1: PHASE DEFINITIONS

phase_rules <- list(
  LALA = list(acclim_end = "10-31", maint_end = "03-15"),
  PIMA = list(acclim_end = "10-31", maint_end = "03-15"),
  CHCA = list(acclim_end = "10-31", maint_end = "03-15"),
  RHGR = list(acclim_end = "10-31", maint_end = "03-15")
)


# Function: assign phase for a given species, using its rules
assign_phase <- function(date, species) {
  rules <- phase_rules[[species]]
  if (is.null(rules)) return(NA_character_)

  # Parse cutoff dates using the same year as the observation
  # but handle the season-crossing (Aug-Jun) correctly via month only
  mo <- month(date)
  dy <- day(date)

  acclim_mo <- as.integer(substr(rules$acclim_end, 1, 2))
  acclim_dy <- as.integer(substr(rules$acclim_end, 4, 5))
  maint_mo  <- as.integer(substr(rules$maint_end,  1, 2))
  maint_dy  <- as.integer(substr(rules$maint_end,  4, 5))

  # Encode date as day-of-season integer for easy comparison
  # Season runs Aug(8) -> Jun(6), so shift: Aug=1, ..., Dec=5, Jan=6, ..., Jun=11
  season_day <- function(m, d) {
    m_shifted <- if (m >= 8) m - 7 else m + 5
    m_shifted * 100 + d
  }

  obs_sd    <- season_day(mo, dy)
  acclim_sd <- season_day(acclim_mo, acclim_dy)
  maint_sd  <- season_day(maint_mo,  maint_dy)

  # Aug 1 start of season
  season_start_sd <- season_day(8, 1)

  if (obs_sd >= season_start_sd & obs_sd <= acclim_sd) {
    "Acclimation"
  } else if (obs_sd > acclim_sd & obs_sd <= maint_sd) {
    "Maintenance"
  } else if (obs_sd > maint_sd) {
    "Deacclimation"
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }
}

# Vectorised wrapper
assign_phase_vec <- function(dates, species_vec) {
  mapply(assign_phase, dates, species_vec, USE.NAMES = FALSE)
}


# SECTION 2: INTER-COLLECTION TEMPERATURE WINDOW

# --- 2a) Build collection interval table ---
collections_tbl_ic <- collections_tbl %>%          # already exists from your earlier code
  arrange(Collection_Date) %>%
  mutate(Prev_Date = lag(Collection_Date))          # NA for the very first collection

# Helper: compute inter-collection mean temp from a weather data frame
# weather_df must have columns: Treatment, Date, Tmean
make_intercoll_temp <- function(weather_df) {
  weather_df %>%
    group_by(Treatment, Date) %>%
    summarise(Tmean = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(Treatment = as.character(Treatment))
}

# --- 2b) Compute inter-collection mean per Treatment × Collection ---
compute_ic_temp <- function(weather_df) {
  daily <- make_intercoll_temp(weather_df)

  purrr::pmap_dfr(
    list(collections_tbl_ic$Collection,
         collections_tbl_ic$Collection_Date,
         collections_tbl_ic$Prev_Date),
    function(coll, coll_date, prev_date) {
      if (is.na(prev_date)) return(NULL)   # skip first collection (no window)
      daily %>%
        filter(Date > prev_date, Date <= coll_date) %>%
        group_by(Treatment) %>%
        summarise(
          Tmean_ic   = mean(Tmean, na.rm = TRUE),
          n_days_ic  = sum(!is.na(Tmean)),
          .groups    = "drop"
        ) %>%
        mutate(Collection = coll,
               Collection_Date = coll_date,
               Prev_Date = prev_date,
               Window_days = as.integer(coll_date - prev_date))
    }
  )
}

# Run for both heights
ic_temp_2m <- compute_ic_temp(wdat_2b)   # overstory (2 m)
ic_temp_0m <- compute_ic_temp(wdat_0b)   # understory (0 m)



# SECTION 3: BUILD DELTA LTE TABLES WITH INTER-COLLECTION TEMPERATURE

build_delta_lte <- function(data, species_code, ic_temp_df, corrected_col) {
  # Step 1: one LTE mean per Season × Treatment × Date × Species
  lte_sum <- data %>%
    filter(Species == species_code) %>%
    mutate(Treatment = as.character(Treatment)) %>%
    group_by(Season, Treatment, Date, Sequence, Species) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      Mean_LTE      = mean(LTE, na.rm = TRUE),
      Corrected_T   = mean(.data[[corrected_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  # Step 2: ΔLTE (difference from previous collection within Season × Treatment)
  lte_delta <- lte_sum %>%
    group_by(Season, Treatment, Species) %>%
    # dplyr::arrange(Date, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(Season, Treatment, Species, Date) %>%  # explicit columns instead of .by_group
    mutate(Delta_LTE = Mean_LTE - lag(Mean_LTE)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    filter(!is.na(Delta_LTE))

  # Step 3: join inter-collection temperature
  # Match on Treatment and Collection (= Sequence in your data)
  lte_delta %>%
    left_join(
      ic_temp_df %>%
        dplyr::select(Treatment, Collection, Tmean_ic, n_days_ic, Window_days),
      by = c("Treatment", "Sequence" = "Collection")
    ) %>%
    # Step 4: assign phase using unified rules
    mutate(
      Process = assign_phase_vec(Date, Species),
      Process = factor(Process, levels = c("Acclimation", "Maintenance", "Deacclimation"))
    )
}

# --- Build for all four species ---
lala_delta <- build_delta_lte(initial.ch2,        "LALA", ic_temp_2m, "Corrected_T_2m")
pima_delta  <- build_delta_lte(initial.ch2,        "PIMA", ic_temp_2m, "Corrected_T_2m")
chca_delta  <- build_delta_lte(initial.ch_joined,  "CHCA", ic_temp_0m, "Corrected_T_0m")
rhgr_delta  <- build_delta_lte(initial.ch_joined,  "RHGR", ic_temp_0m, "Corrected_T_0m")

# --- Combine into overstory / understory / all ---
overstory_delta <- bind_rows(
  lala_delta %>% mutate(Classification = "Overstory"),
  pima_delta  %>% mutate(Classification = "Overstory")
)

understory_delta <- bind_rows(
  chca_delta %>% mutate(Classification = "Understory"),
  rhgr_delta %>% mutate(Classification = "Understory")
)

all_species_delta <- bind_rows(overstory_delta, understory_delta)


# SECTION 4: ORIGINAL FIGURE STYLE (with regression lines, no equations)

phase_colors <- c(
  "Acclimation"    = "#A62800",
  "Maintenance"    = "#0969A2",
  "Deacclimation"  = "#7CAE00"
)

base_theme <- theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    strip.background  = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.ticks        = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.spacing     = unit(1, "lines")
  )

make_original_plot <- function(df, x_limits = c(-20, 25), y_limits = c(-15, 20)) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Tmean_ic, y = Delta_LTE, color = Process, fill = Process)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.1, color = "gray15") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.1, color = "gray15") +
    geom_point(aes(shape = factor(Season)), size = 1, alpha = 0.75) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x, se = TRUE, linewidth = 0.8) +
    facet_wrap(~ Classification) +
    scale_color_manual(values = phase_colors) +
    scale_fill_manual(values  = phase_colors) +
    scale_shape_manual(
      values = c("2022" = 22, "2023" = 23, "2024" = 24, "2025" = 25),
      name   = "Season"
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = x_limits,
      breaks = seq(x_limits[1], x_limits[2], by = 5),
      guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = y_limits,
      breaks = c(-15, -10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 15),
      guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Inter-Collection Mean Air Temperature (°C)",
      y = expression(Delta ~ LTE)
    ) +
    base_theme
}

# Individual species plots (add stat_poly_eq() on top as before)
fig_lala <- make_original_plot(lala_delta %>% mutate(Classification = "LALA"))
fig_pima <- make_original_plot(pima_delta  %>% mutate(Classification = "PIMA"))
fig_chca <- make_original_plot(chca_delta  %>% mutate(Classification = "CHCA"))
fig_rhgr <- make_original_plot(rhgr_delta  %>% mutate(Classification = "RHGR"))

# Combined overstory + understory (two-panel, matches your current fig_4 layout)
fig_original_combined <- make_original_plot(all_species_delta)
fig_original_combined


fig_original_combined2 <- fig_original_combined +
  stat_poly_eq(
    data = all_species_delta,
    aes(
      x = Tmean_ic, y = Delta_LTE, group = Process,
      # equation + p-value on one line (plotmath)
      label = after_stat(paste(eq.label, p.value.label, sep = "*\",  \"*"))
    ),
    formula = my.formula,
    small.p = TRUE,
    size = 2,
    coef.digits = 2,     # regression coefficients to 2 decimals
    # top-left in normalized parent coordinates
    # label.x.npc = 0.02,   # or "left"
    # label.y.npc = 0.98,   # or "top"
    vstep = 0.06,          # vertical spacing between groups to prevent overlap
  )

fig_original_combined2



# SECTION 5: QUALITATIVE FIGURE

# # How many observations per phase × classification?
# all_species_delta %>%
#   filter(!is.na(Process)) %>%
#   count(Classification, Process) %>%
#   print()

# Any collections with no temperature data (Tmean_ic = NA)?
all_species_delta %>%
  filter(is.na(Tmean_ic)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Species, Season, Sequence, Treatment, Date) %>%
  print()


phase_colors <- c(
  "Acclimation"   = "#A62800",
  "Maintenance"   = "#0969A2",
  "Deacclimation" = "#7CAE00"
)

base_theme <- theme_bw(base_size = 8) +
  theme(
    legend.position        = "right",
    legend.key.size        = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    legend.title           = element_text(size = 7, face = "bold"),
    legend.text            = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.background       = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC", fill = "#F5F5F5"),
    strip.text             = element_text(size = 8),
    panel.grid             = element_blank(),
    panel.border           = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x            = element_line(linewidth = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y            = element_line(linewidth = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text              = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.title             = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.ticks             = element_line(linewidth = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length      = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    panel.spacing          = unit(1.5, "lines")
  )

x_limits <- c(-20, 35)
y_limits <- c(-15, 15)
x_breaks <- seq(-20, 35, by = 5)
y_breaks <- c(-15, -10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 15)

shared_scales <- list(
  scale_x_continuous(limits = x_limits, breaks = x_breaks,
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = y_limits, breaks = y_breaks,
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")),
  scale_color_manual(values = phase_colors, name = "Phase"),
  scale_fill_manual(values  = phase_colors, name = "Phase"),
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.15, color = "gray30"),
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.15, color = "gray30"),
  labs(x = "Inter-Collection Mean Air Temperature (°C)",
       y = expression(Delta ~ CH ~ "(°C)"))
)


centroids <- all_species_delta %>%
  filter(!is.na(Process), !is.na(Tmean_ic), !is.na(Delta_LTE)) %>%
  group_by(Classification, Process) %>%
  summarise(
    x    = mean(Tmean_ic,  na.rm = TRUE),
    y    = mean(Delta_LTE, na.rm = TRUE),
    n    = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Process = factor(Process,
                          levels = c("Acclimation", "Maintenance", "Deacclimation")))

# Arrow segments: connect centroids in seasonal order
# Acclimation -> Maintenance -> Deacclimation
# Segments are shortened by `shrink` fraction at BOTH ends so arrowheads
# are not hidden under the centroid points.
arrows_df <- centroids %>%
  arrange(Classification, Process) %>%
  group_by(Classification) %>%
  mutate(
    xend_raw = lead(x),
    yend_raw = lead(y)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(xend_raw)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    shrink = 0.18,   # pull each end 18% toward the other — increase if still hidden
    xend   = x    + (1 - shrink) * (xend_raw - x),
    yend   = y    + (1 - shrink) * (yend_raw - y),
    x      = x    + shrink       * (xend_raw - x),
    y      = y    + shrink       * (yend_raw - y)
  )


fig_A2 <- ggplot(
  all_species_delta %>%
    filter(!is.na(Process), !is.na(Tmean_ic), !is.na(Delta_LTE)),
  aes(x = Tmean_ic, y = Delta_LTE, color = Process, fill = Process)
) +
  shared_scales +
  
  # Ellipses
  stat_ellipse(
    type      = "norm",
    level     = 0.95,
    geom      = "polygon",
    alpha     = 0.12,
    linewidth = 0.55
  ) +
  
  # Centroids
  geom_point(
    data  = centroids,
    aes(x = x, y = y, color = Process, fill = Process),
    size  = 3,
    shape = 21,
    stroke = 0.8,
    color  = "white"        # white ring around centroid for contrast
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data  = centroids,
    aes(x = x, y = y, color = Process),
    size  = 2.2,
    shape = 19
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ Classification) +
  base_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

fig_A2


# FIGURE 2 — Seasonal Trajectory Arrow Plot
# Ellipses for context + arrows connecting phase centroids in seasonal order


fig_arrow <- ggplot(
  all_species_delta %>%
    filter(!is.na(Process), !is.na(Tmean_ic), !is.na(Delta_LTE)),
  aes(x = Tmean_ic, y = Delta_LTE, color = Process, fill = Process)
) +
  shared_scales +
  
  geom_point(size = 0.6, alpha = 0.20) +
  
  # Ellipses — slightly more transparent than A2 so arrows read clearly
  stat_ellipse(
    type      = "norm",
    level     = 0.9,
    geom      = "polygon",
    alpha     = 0.08,
    linewidth = 0.4,
    linetype  = 2     # dashed outline to further de-emphasise
  ) +
  
  # Phase centroid points — larger and bolder, they ARE the story here
  geom_point(
    data   = centroids,
    aes(x = x, y = y, fill = Process),
    size   = 2,
    shape  = 21,
    stroke = 0.6,
    color  = "white"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-20, 16), 
                     breaks = seq(-20, 15, 5),
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")) + 
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-21, 40), 
                     breaks = seq(-20, 40, 10),
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")) + 
  
  facet_wrap(~ Classification) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    # strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text   = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.ticks  = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing    = unit(1.0, "lines")   # <<< this increases space between facets
    
  )

fig_arrow


# ggsave("Fig4_21.pdf", plot=fig_arrow, width=3.9, height=2.5, units ="in",
# bg = "transparent", dpi = 300, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")



process_colors <- c(
  "Acclimation"   = "#A62800",
  "Maintenance"   = "#0969A2",
  "Deacclimation" = "#7CAE00"
)

treatment_colors <- c(
  "-2.25" = "#333366",
  "0"     = "#009999",
  "2.25"  = "#99CC33",
  "4.5"   = "#FFCC00",
  "6.75"  = "#CC3366",
  "9"     = "#990000"
)

trt_levels <- c("-2.25", "0", "2.25", "4.5", "6.75", "9")

# Prepare data

all_species_delta_all <- all_species_delta %>%
  filter(!is.na(Process), !is.na(Tmean_ic), !is.na(Delta_LTE)) %>%
  mutate(
    Treatment = factor(as.character(Treatment), levels = trt_levels),
    Process   = factor(Process,
                       levels = c("Acclimation", "Maintenance", "Deacclimation"))
  )

# Centroids per Classification × Process × Treatment
centroids_all <- all_species_delta_all %>%
  group_by(Classification, Process, Treatment) %>%
  summarise(
    x = mean(Tmean_ic,  na.rm = TRUE),
    y = mean(Delta_LTE, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Arrow segments per Classification × Treatment
# Connect Process centroids in seasonal order within each treatment
arrows_all <- centroids_all %>%
  arrange(Classification, Treatment, Process) %>%
  group_by(Classification, Treatment) %>%
  mutate(
    xend_raw = lead(x),
    yend_raw = lead(y)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(xend_raw)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    shrink = 0.18,
    xend   = x + (1 - shrink) * (xend_raw - x),
    yend   = y + (1 - shrink) * (yend_raw - y),
    x      = x + shrink       * (xend_raw - x),
    y      = y + shrink       * (yend_raw - y)
  )


# FIGURE

fig_arrow_clean <- ggplot(
    all_species_delta_all,
    aes(x = Tmean_ic, y = Delta_LTE)
  ) +
  shared_scales +

  # --- Layer 1: Process ellipses (background context, no individual points) ---
  stat_ellipse(
    aes(fill = Process, color = Process),
    type      = "norm",
    level     = 0.90,
    geom      = "polygon",
    alpha     = 0.08,
    linewidth = 0.4,
    linetype  = 2
  ) +

  # --- Layer 3: Centroid points — white ring + treatment color fill ---
  geom_point(
    data  = centroids_all,
    aes(x = x, y = y, fill = Treatment),
    size  = 2.2,
    shape = 21,
    stroke = 0.5,
    color  = "white"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data  = centroids_all,
    aes(x = x, y = y, color = Treatment),
    size  = 1.4,
    shape = 19
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ Classification) +

  # Process = fill (ellipses)
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(process_colors,   # for ellipses
               treatment_colors), # for centroid fill
    breaks = names(process_colors),  # only show process in fill legend
    name   = "Phase"
  ) +

  # Treatment = color (arrows + centroid outlines)
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(process_colors, treatment_colors),
    breaks = names(treatment_colors),   # only show treatments in color legend
    name   = "Treatment (°C)",
    labels = c("Ambient", "0", "2.25", "4.5", "6.75", "9")
  ) +

  guides(
    fill  = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(alpha = 0.3, linetype = 2, shape = NA),
      order = 1
    ),
    color = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(shape = 19, size = 2, linetype = 0),
      order = 2
    )
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-20, 16), 
                     breaks = seq(-20, 15, 5),
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")) + 
  
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-21, 40), 
                     breaks = seq(-20, 40, 10),
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")) + 
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    # strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text   = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.ticks  = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing    = unit(1, "lines")   # <<< this increases space between facets
    
  )

fig_arrow_clean


# ggsave("FigSDeltaLTE_v5.pdf", plot=fig_arrow_clean, width=3.9, height=2.5, units ="in",
# bg = "transparent", dpi = 300, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")



```



```{r Figure 1 and 3}

#### Figure 2: ICH

#LALA

f1_lala <- ggplot()+
 
      geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#333366", fill = "#333366") +

        geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "9")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#990000", fill = "#990000") +

        geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#333366", stat="summary") +
  
        geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "9")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#990000", stat="summary") +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, size=0.2, lty=3)+

  
   geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "LALA"), size=0.6, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +

      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "LALA"), stat="summary", size=1.3, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "LALA"), stat="summary", size=1)+
  
  
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  # ylab("Temperature (°C)")+
  ylab("")+
  xlab("Month") +
  
  # scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b", date_breaks = "1 month", minor_breaks = "1 month", guide = guide_axis(cap = "both"))+
  
  scale_x_date(breaks = as.Date(c("2023-09-01", "2023-10-01", "2023-11-01",
                                   "2023-12-01","2024-01-01", "2024-02-01", 
                                   "2024-03-01","2024-04-01", "2024-05-01")),
  labels = c("Sep", "", "Nov", "", "Jan", "", "Mar", "", "May"),
  guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both"))+

  scale_y_continuous(
  limits = c(-40, 50),
  breaks = c(-40, -35, -30, -25, -20, -15, -10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 45, 50),
  labels = c(-40, "", -30, "", -20, "", -10, "", 0, "", 10, "", 20, "", 30, "", 40, "", 50),
  expand = c(0, 0),
  sec.axis = sec_axis(
    ~ . * 1,
    breaks = c(-40, -35, -30, -25, -20, -15, -10, -5, 0),
    labels = c("", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", ""),
    name = ""
  ),
  guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")
)+
  
  
 theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    legend.key.size = unit(1, 'lines'),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, 'lines'),        
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = c("black"), angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5))+
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(as.Date("2023-08-25"), as.Date("2024-05-09")), ylim = c(-40, 50), expand = TRUE, default = FALSE, clip = "on")


f1_lala

dat_LALA <- initial.ch2 %>%
  filter(Species %in% c("LALA")) %>%
  mutate(Temperature = as.numeric(as.character(Treatment)))  %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T = as.numeric(as.character(Corrected_T_2m))) 

dat_mean_LALA <- dat_LALA %>%
  group_by(Season, Date, Treatment, Collection, Sequence, Temperature, Species, Corrected_T) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(LT50 = mean(LTE, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

dat2_LALA       <- dat_LALA      %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)
dat_mean2_LALA  <- dat_mean_LALA %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)

## define which Sequences represent Fall/Winter/Spring for each Season

seq_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Season, ~Sequence, ~Sequence2,

  "C", "CD", "Fall",  "C", "CF", "Winter",  "C", "CH", "Winter", "C", "CM", "Spring",

)

# dat_main_LALA  <- dat_LALA      %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence"))
# dat_main2_LALA <- dat2_LALA     %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence"))
# dat_mean_main2_LALA <- dat_mean2_LALA %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence"))


#Removing data from plot 16, 6.75 collection CM:

# Define the exclusion condition
exclude_condition <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    filter(!(Treatment == 6.75 & Plot == 8 & Sequence == "CH"))
}

# Apply to all three datasets
dat_main_LALA       <- dat_LALA      %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence")) %>% exclude_condition()
dat_main2_LALA      <- dat2_LALA     %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence")) %>% exclude_condition()
dat_mean_main2_LALA <- dat_mean2_LALA %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence"))



## LALA - Combined across years per season (Sequence2 panels)

## set factor order once
dat_main_LALA$Sequence2  <- factor(dat_main_LALA$Sequence2,  levels = c("Fall","Winter","Spring"))
dat_main2_LALA$Sequence2 <- factor(dat_main2_LALA$Sequence2, levels = c("Fall","Winter","Spring"))

dat_main2_LALA <- dat_main2_LALA %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_2m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, 0, Corrected_T_2m))

dat_main_LALA <- dat_main_LALA %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_2m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, 0, Corrected_T_2m))

dat_main_LALA_plot <- dat_main_LALA |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Corrected_T_2m_plot = ifelse(Corrected_T_2m == 0, -1.8, Corrected_T_2m)
  )

dat_main2_LALA_plot <- dat_main2_LALA |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Corrected_T_2m_plot = ifelse(Corrected_T_2m == 0, -1.8, Corrected_T_2m)
)



All_Years_LALA_seq2 <- ggplot() +
  
  geom_beeswarm(
    data = dat_main_LALA_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_2m_plot, y = LTE, col = Sequence2, shape = CO2, fill = Sequence2),
    stroke = 0.1, size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, priority = "density"
  ) +
  
        geom_smooth(
    data = dat_main2_LALA_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_2m_plot, y = LTE, group = Sequence2),
    size = 0.6, method = "lm", formula = my.formula, se = FALSE, color = "black", linetype="solid"
  ) +
  
    stat_summary(
    data = dat_main_LALA_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_2m_plot, y = LTE, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 1.3, color="black"
  ) +
  
  stat_summary(
    data = dat_main_LALA_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_2m_plot, y = LTE, color = Sequence2, shape = CO2,fill = Sequence2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 1
  ) +

      geom_vline(xintercept = 0,lty=2,size=0.1)+
  
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-1.8, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9, 11.25),
                     labels = c("", "0.0", "", "4.5", "", "9.0", ""),
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-35, -5, 10),
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")) +

  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 11), ylim = c(-40, -2)) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#A62800", "#0969A2", "#7CAE00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#A62800", "#0969A2", "#7CAE00")) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ Sequence, ncol = 1, nrow = 4)+

  # Labels
  labs(
    x = expression(paste("Plot temperature (", Delta, italic("T"), ", °C)")),
    y = "Cold hardiness (°C)"
  ) +

  theme_bw(base_size = 5.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 5.5),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size=5.5),
    panel.spacing    = unit(0.15, "lines")   # <<< this increases space between facets

  )

All_Years_LALA_seq2



All_Years_LALA_seq3 <- All_Years_LALA_seq2 +
  stat_poly_eq(
    data = dat_main2_LALA,
    aes(
      x = Corrected_T_2m,
      y = LTE,
      group = Sequence,
      label = after_stat(
        sprintf(
          "y = %.1fx %+.1f\np = %s",
          b_1, b_0,
          ifelse(p.value < 0.001,
                 "<0.001",
                 sprintf("%.3f", p.value))
        )
      )
    ),
    formula = my.formula,
    output.type = "numeric",
    parse = FALSE,
    label.x = 0.23,
    label.y = 0.80,
    hjust = 0,
    size = 1.8
  )

All_Years_LALA_seq3


levels(as.factor(dat_main2_LALA$Corrected_T_2m))





f1_lala+All_Years_LALA_seq3

f1_lala +  All_Years_LALA_seq3 + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(1.5, 1))  # first plot 1.5x taller


fig_1a <- ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(f1_lala, x = 0, y = 0, width = 0.65, height = 1) +          # base plot (left)
  draw_plot(All_Years_LALA_seq3, x = 0.61, y = 0, width = 0.36, height = 1)  # overlay (right)

fig_1a

 
# ggsave("Fig1a_v14.pdf", plot=fig_1a, width=3.5, height=4.0, units ="in", bg = "transparent", dpi = 300, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")

#PIMA

f1_pima <- ggplot()+
 
      geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#333366", fill = "#333366") +

        geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "9")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#990000", fill = "#990000") +

        geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#333366", stat="summary") +
  
        geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "9")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#990000", stat="summary") +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, size=0.2, lty=3)+

  
   geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "PIMA"), size=0.6, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +

      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "PIMA"), stat="summary", size=1.3, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "PIMA"), stat="summary", size=1)+
  
  
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  # ylab("Temperature (°C)")+
  ylab("")+
  xlab("Month") +
  
  # scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b", date_breaks = "1 month", minor_breaks = "1 month", guide = guide_axis(cap = "both"))+
  
  scale_x_date(breaks = as.Date(c("2023-09-01", "2023-10-01", "2023-11-01",
                                   "2023-12-01","2024-01-01", "2024-02-01", 
                                   "2024-03-01","2024-04-01", "2024-05-01")),
  labels = c("Sep", "", "Nov", "", "Jan", "", "Mar", "", "May"),
  guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both"))+


 scale_y_continuous(
  limits = c(-40, 50),
  breaks = c(-40, -35, -30, -25, -20, -15, -10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 45, 50),
  labels = c(-40, "", -30, "", -20, "", -10, "", 0, "", 10, "", 20, "", 30, "", 40, "", 50),
  expand = c(0, 0),
  sec.axis = sec_axis(
    ~ . * 1,
    breaks = c(-40, -35, -30, -25, -20, -15, -10, -5, 0),
    labels = c(-40, "", -30, "", -20, "", -10, "", 0),
    name = ""
  ),
  guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")
)+
  
 theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    legend.key.size = unit(1, 'lines'),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    # axis.text = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.2, 'lines'),        
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = c("black"), angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5))+
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(as.Date("2023-08-25"), as.Date("2024-05-09")), ylim = c(-40, 50), expand = TRUE, default = FALSE, clip = "on")


f1_pima

dat_PIMA <- initial.ch2 %>%
  filter(Species %in% c("PIMA")) %>%
  mutate(Temperature = as.numeric(as.character(Treatment)))  %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T = as.numeric(as.character(Corrected_T_2m))) 

dat_mean_PIMA <- dat_PIMA %>%
  group_by(Season, Date, Treatment, Collection, Sequence, Temperature, Species, Corrected_T) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(LT50 = mean(LTE, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

dat2_PIMA       <- dat_PIMA      %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)
dat_mean2_PIMA  <- dat_mean_PIMA %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)

## define which Sequences represent Fall/Winter/Spring for each Season

seq_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Season, ~Sequence, ~Sequence2,

  "C", "CD", "Fall",  "C", "CF", "Winter",  "C", "CH", "Winter", "C", "CM", "Spring",

)

# dat_main_LALA  <- dat_LALA      %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence"))
# dat_main2_LALA <- dat2_LALA     %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence"))
# dat_mean_main2_LALA <- dat_mean2_LALA %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence"))


#Removing data from plot 16, 6.75 collection CM:

# Define the exclusion condition

# Apply to all three datasets
dat_main_PIMA      <- dat_PIMA      %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence")) 
dat_main2_PIMA      <- dat2_PIMA     %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence")) 
dat_mean_main2_PIMA <- dat_mean2_PIMA %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence"))


## LALA - Combined across years per season (Sequence2 panels)

## set factor order once
dat_main_PIMA$Sequence2  <- factor(dat_main_PIMA$Sequence2,  levels = c("Fall","Winter","Spring"))
dat_main2_PIMA$Sequence2 <- factor(dat_main2_PIMA$Sequence2, levels = c("Fall","Winter","Spring"))

dat_main2_PIMA <- dat_main2_PIMA %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_2m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, 0, Corrected_T_2m))

dat_main_PIMA <- dat_main_PIMA %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_2m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, 0, Corrected_T_2m))

dat_main_PIMA_plot <- dat_main_PIMA |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Corrected_T_2m_plot = ifelse(Corrected_T_2m == 0, -1.8, Corrected_T_2m)
  )

dat_main2_PIMA_plot <- dat_main2_PIMA |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Corrected_T_2m_plot = ifelse(Corrected_T_2m == 0, -1.8, Corrected_T_2m)
)



All_Years_PIMA_seq2 <- ggplot() +
  
  geom_beeswarm(
    data = dat_main_PIMA_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_2m_plot, y = LTE, col = Sequence2, shape = CO2, fill = Sequence2),
    stroke = 0.1, size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, priority = "density"
  ) +
  
        geom_smooth(
    data = dat_main2_PIMA_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_2m_plot, y = LTE, group = Sequence2),
    size = 0.6, method = "lm", formula = my.formula, se = FALSE, color = "black", linetype="solid"
  ) +
  
    stat_summary(
    data = dat_main_PIMA_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_2m_plot, y = LTE, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 1.3, color="black"
  ) +
  
  stat_summary(
    data = dat_main_PIMA_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_2m_plot, y = LTE, color = Sequence2, shape = CO2,fill = Sequence2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 1
  ) +

      geom_vline(xintercept = 0,lty=2,size=0.1)+
  
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-1.8, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9, 11.25),
                     labels = c("", "0.0", "", "4.5", "", "9.0", ""),
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-35, -5, 10),
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")) +

  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 11), ylim = c(-40, -2)) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#A62800", "#0969A2", "#7CAE00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#A62800", "#0969A2", "#7CAE00")) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ Sequence, ncol = 1, nrow = 4)+

  # Labels
  labs(
    x = expression(paste("Plot temperature (", Delta, italic("T"), ", °C)")),
    y = ""
  ) +

  theme_bw(base_size = 5.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    # axis.text = element_text(size = 5.5),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size=5.5),
    panel.spacing    = unit(0.15, "lines")   # <<< this increases space between facets

  )

All_Years_PIMA_seq2



All_Years_PIMA_seq3 <- All_Years_PIMA_seq2 +
  stat_poly_eq(
    data = dat_main2_PIMA,
    aes(
      x = Corrected_T_2m,
      y = LTE,
      group = Sequence,
      label = after_stat(
        sprintf(
          "y = %.1fx %+.1f\np = %s",
          b_1, b_0,
          ifelse(p.value < 0.001,
                 "<0.001",
                 sprintf("%.3f", p.value))
        )
      )
    ),
    formula = my.formula,
    output.type = "numeric",
    parse = FALSE,
    label.x = 0.23,
    label.y = 0.80,
    hjust = 0,
    size = 1.8
  )

All_Years_PIMA_seq3




f1_pima+All_Years_PIMA_seq3

f1_pima +  All_Years_PIMA_seq3 + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(1.5, 1))  # first plot 1.5x taller


fig_1_PIMA <- ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(f1_pima, x = 0, y = 0, width = 0.65, height = 1) +          # base plot (left)
  draw_plot(All_Years_PIMA_seq3, x = 0.61, y = 0, width = 0.36, height = 1)  # overlay (right)

fig_1_PIMA

 
# ggsave("Fig1a_v14.pdf", plot=fig_1a, width=3.5, height=4.0, units ="in", bg = "transparent", dpi = 300, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")

#CHCA
 
f1_chca <- ggplot()+

      geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#333366", fill = "#333366") +

        geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "9")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#990000", fill = "#990000") +

            geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#333366", stat="summary") +
  
          geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "9")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#990000", stat="summary") +
  
    geom_hline(yintercept=0, size=0.2, lty=3)+
  
   geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "CHCA"), size=0.6, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
  
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "CHCA"), stat="summary", size=1.3, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "CHCA"), stat="summary", size=1)+
  
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  # ylab("Temperature (°C)")+
  ylab("")+
  
  xlab("Month") + 

    scale_x_date(breaks = as.Date(c("2023-09-01", "2023-10-01", "2023-11-01",
                                   "2023-12-01","2024-01-01", "2024-02-01", 
                                   "2024-03-01","2024-04-01", "2024-05-01")),
  labels = c("Sep", "", "Nov", "", "Jan", "", "Mar", "", "May"),
  guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both"))+

  
 scale_y_continuous(
  limits = c(-40, 50),
  breaks = c(-40, -35, -30, -25, -20, -15, -10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 45, 50),
  labels = c(-40, "", -30, "", -20, "", -10, "", 0, "", 10, "", 20, "", 30, "", 40, "", 50),
  expand = c(0, 0),
  sec.axis = sec_axis(
    ~ . * 1,
    breaks = c(-40, -35, -30, -25, -20, -15, -10, -5, 0),
    labels = c(-40, "", -30, "", -20, "", -10, "", 0),
    name = ""
  ),
  guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")
)+
  
 theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    legend.key.size = unit(1, 'lines'),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    # axis.text = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.2, 'lines'),        
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = c("black"), angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5))+
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(as.Date("2023-08-25"), as.Date("2024-05-15")), ylim = c(-40, 50), expand = TRUE, default = FALSE, clip = "on")

f1_chca


dat_CHCA <- initial.ch2 %>%
  filter(Species %in% c("CHCA")) %>%
  mutate(Temperature = as.numeric(as.character(Treatment)))  %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T = as.numeric(as.character(Corrected_T_0m))) 

dat_mean_CHCA <- dat_CHCA %>%
  group_by(Season, Date, Treatment, Collection, Sequence, Temperature, Species, Corrected_T) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(LT50 = mean(LTE, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

dat2_CHCA       <- dat_CHCA      %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)
dat_mean2_CHCA  <- dat_mean_CHCA %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)

## define which Sequences represent Fall/Winter/Spring for each Season

seq_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Season, ~Sequence, ~Sequence2,

  "C", "CD", "Fall",  "C", "CF", "Winter",  "C", "CH", "Winter", "C", "CM", "Spring",

)

dat_main_CHCA  <- dat_CHCA      %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence"))
dat_main2_CHCA <- dat2_CHCA     %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence"))
dat_mean_main2_CHCA <- dat_mean2_CHCA %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence"))

## LALA - Combined across years per season (Sequence2 panels)

## set factor order once
dat_main_CHCA$Sequence2  <- factor(dat_main_CHCA$Sequence2,  levels = c("Fall","Winter","Spring"))
dat_main2_CHCA$Sequence2 <- factor(dat_main2_CHCA$Sequence2, levels = c("Fall","Winter","Spring"))


dat_main2_CHCA <- dat_main2_CHCA %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_0m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, 0, Corrected_T_0m))

dat_main_CHCA <- dat_main_CHCA %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_0m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, 0, Corrected_T_0m))

dat_main_CHCA_plot <- dat_main_CHCA |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Corrected_T_0m_plot = ifelse(Corrected_T_0m == 0, -1.8, Corrected_T_0m)
  )

dat_main2_CHCA_plot <- dat_main2_CHCA |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Corrected_T_0m_plot = ifelse(Corrected_T_0m == 0, -1.8, Corrected_T_0m)
)


All_Years_CHCA_seq2 <- ggplot() +
  
  geom_beeswarm(
    data = dat_main_CHCA_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_0m_plot, y = LTE, col = Sequence2, shape = CO2, fill = Sequence2),
    stroke = 0.1, size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, priority = "density"
  ) +
  
        geom_smooth(
    data = dat_main2_CHCA_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_0m_plot, y = LTE, group = Sequence2),
    size = 0.6, method = "lm", formula = my.formula, se = FALSE, color = "black", linetype="solid"
  ) +
  
    stat_summary(
    data = dat_main_CHCA_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_0m_plot, y = LTE, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 0.9, color="black"
  ) +
  
  stat_summary(
    data = dat_main_CHCA_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_0m_plot, y = LTE, color = Sequence2, shape = CO2,fill = Sequence2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 0.7
  ) +

      geom_vline(xintercept = 0,lty=2,size=0.1)+
  
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-1.8, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9, 11.25),
                     labels = c("", "0.0", "", "4.5", "", "9.0", ""),
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")) +
  

  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-35, -5, 10),
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")) +

  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 11), ylim = c(-40, -2)) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#A62800", "#0969A2", "#7CAE00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#A62800", "#0969A2", "#7CAE00")) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ Sequence, ncol = 1, nrow = 4)+

  # Labels
  labs(
    x = expression(paste("Plot temperature (", Delta, italic("T"), ", °C)")),
    y = ""
  ) +

  theme_bw(base_size = 5.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    # axis.text = element_text(size = 5.5),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size=5.5),
    panel.spacing    = unit(0.15, "lines")   # <<< this increases space between facets

  )

All_Years_CHCA_seq2



All_Years_CHCA_seq3 <- All_Years_CHCA_seq2 +
  stat_poly_eq(
    data  = dat_main2_CHCA,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_0m, y = LTE, group = Sequence,
        label = after_stat(tolower(p.value.label)) ),
    label.x = 0.23, label.y = 0.80, size = 1.3, formula = my.formula
  ) +
  stat_regline_equation(
    data = dat_main2_CHCA,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_0m, y = LTE, group = Sequence),
    size = 1.6, label.x = 1.42, label.y = -6
  )

All_Years_CHCA_seq3



All_Years_CHCA_seq3 <- All_Years_CHCA_seq2 +
  stat_poly_eq(
    data = dat_main2_CHCA,
    aes(
      x = Corrected_T_0m,
      y = LTE,
      group = Sequence,
      label = after_stat(
        sprintf(
          "y = %.1fx %+.1f\np = %s",
          b_1, b_0,
          ifelse(p.value < 0.001,
                 "<0.001",
                 sprintf("%.3f", p.value))
        )
      )
    ),
    formula = my.formula,
    output.type = "numeric",
    parse = FALSE,
    label.x = 0.23,
    label.y = 0.80,
    hjust = 0,
    size = 1.8
  )

All_Years_CHCA_seq3



fig_1b <- ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(f1_chca, x = 0, y = 0, width = 0.65, height = 1) +          # base plot (left)
  draw_plot(All_Years_CHCA_seq3, x = 0.61, y = 0, width = 0.36, height = 1)  # overlay (right)

fig_1b


levels(as.factor(dat_main2_CHCA$Corrected_T_0m))


#RHGR
 
f1_rhgr <- ggplot()+

      geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#333366", fill = "#333366") +

        geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "9")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#990000", fill = "#990000") +

            geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#333366", stat="summary") +
  
          geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "9")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#990000", stat="summary") +
  
    geom_hline(yintercept=0, size=0.2, lty=3)+
  
   geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "RHGR"), size=0.6, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
  
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "RHGR"), stat="summary", size=1.3, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "RHGR"), stat="summary", size=1)+
  
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  # ylab("Temperature (°C)")+
  ylab("")+
  
  xlab("Month") + 

    scale_x_date(breaks = as.Date(c("2023-09-01", "2023-10-01", "2023-11-01",
                                   "2023-12-01","2024-01-01", "2024-02-01", 
                                   "2024-03-01","2024-04-01", "2024-05-01")),
  labels = c("Sep", "", "Nov", "", "Jan", "", "Mar", "", "May"),
  guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both"))+

  
 scale_y_continuous(
  limits = c(-40, 50),
  breaks = c(-40, -35, -30, -25, -20, -15, -10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 45, 50),
  labels = c("", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", ""),
  expand = c(0, 0),
  sec.axis = sec_axis(
    ~ . * 1,
    breaks = c(-40, -35, -30, -25, -20, -15, -10, -5, 0),
    labels = c(-40, "", -30, "", -20, "", -10, "", 0),
    name = ""
  ),
  guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")
)+
  
 theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    legend.key.size = unit(1, 'lines'),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 6),
    # axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.2, 'lines'),        
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = c("black"), angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5))+
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(as.Date("2023-08-25"), as.Date("2024-05-15")), ylim = c(-40, 50), expand = TRUE, default = FALSE, clip = "on")

f1_rhgr


dat_RHGR <- initial.ch2 %>%
  filter(Species %in% c("RHGR")) %>%
  mutate(Temperature = as.numeric(as.character(Treatment)))  %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T = as.numeric(as.character(Corrected_T_0m))) 

dat_mean_RHGR <- dat_RHGR %>%
  group_by(Season, Date, Treatment, Collection, Sequence, Temperature, Species, Corrected_T) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(LT50 = mean(LTE, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

dat2_RHGR       <- dat_RHGR      %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)
dat_mean2_RHGR  <- dat_mean_RHGR %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)

## define which Sequences represent Fall/Winter/Spring for each Season

seq_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Season, ~Sequence, ~Sequence2,

  "C", "CD", "Fall",  "C", "CF", "Winter",  "C", "CH", "Winter", "C", "CM", "Spring",

)

dat_main_RHGR  <- dat_RHGR      %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence"))
dat_main2_RHGR <- dat2_RHGR     %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence"))
dat_mean_main2_RHGR <- dat_mean2_RHGR %>% inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence"))

## RHGR - Combined across years per season (Sequence2 panels)

## set factor order once
dat_main_RHGR$Sequence2  <- factor(dat_main_RHGR$Sequence2,  levels = c("Fall","Winter","Spring"))
dat_main2_RHGR$Sequence2 <- factor(dat_main2_RHGR$Sequence2, levels = c("Fall","Winter","Spring"))


dat_main2_RHGR <- dat_main2_RHGR %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_0m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, 0, Corrected_T_0m))

dat_main_RHGR <- dat_main_RHGR %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_0m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, 0, Corrected_T_0m))

dat_main_RHGR_plot <- dat_main_RHGR |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Corrected_T_0m_plot = ifelse(Corrected_T_0m == 0, -1.8, Corrected_T_0m)
  )

dat_main2_RHGR_plot <- dat_main2_RHGR |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Corrected_T_0m_plot = ifelse(Corrected_T_0m == 0, -1.8, Corrected_T_0m)
)


All_Years_RHGR_seq2 <- ggplot() +
  
  geom_beeswarm(
    data = dat_main_RHGR_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_0m_plot, y = LTE, col = Sequence2, shape = CO2, fill = Sequence2),
    stroke = 0.1, size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, priority = "density"
  ) +
  
        geom_smooth(
    data = dat_main2_RHGR_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_0m_plot, y = LTE, group = Sequence2),
    size = 0.6, method = "lm", formula = my.formula, se = FALSE, color = "black", linetype="solid"
  ) +
  
    stat_summary(
    data = dat_main_RHGR_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_0m_plot, y = LTE, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 0.9, color="black"
  ) +
  
  stat_summary(
    data = dat_main_RHGR_plot, aes(x = Corrected_T_0m_plot, y = LTE, color = Sequence2, shape = CO2,fill = Sequence2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 0.7
  ) +

      geom_vline(xintercept = 0,lty=2,size=0.1)+
  
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-1.8, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9, 11.25),
                     labels = c("", "0.0", "", "4.5", "", "9.0", ""),
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")) +
  

  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-35, -5, 10),
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")) +

  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 11), ylim = c(-40, -2)) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#A62800", "#0969A2", "#7CAE00")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#A62800", "#0969A2", "#7CAE00")) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ Sequence, ncol = 1, nrow = 4)+

  # Labels
  labs(
    x = expression(paste("Plot temperature (", Delta, italic("T"), ", °C)")),
    y = ""
  ) +

  theme_bw(base_size = 5.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    # axis.text = element_text(size = 5.5),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size=5.5),
    panel.spacing    = unit(0.15, "lines")   # <<< this increases space between facets

  )

All_Years_RHGR_seq2



All_Years_RHGR_seq3 <- All_Years_RHGR_seq2 +
  stat_poly_eq(
    data  = dat_main2_RHGR,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_0m, y = LTE, group = Sequence,
        label = after_stat(tolower(p.value.label)) ),
    label.x = 0.23, label.y = 0.80, size = 1.3, formula = my.formula
  ) +
  stat_regline_equation(
    data = dat_main2_RHGR,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_0m, y = LTE, group = Sequence),
    size = 1.6, label.x = 1.42, label.y = -6
  )

All_Years_RHGR_seq3



All_Years_RHGR_seq3 <- All_Years_RHGR_seq2 +
  stat_poly_eq(
    data = dat_main2_RHGR,
    aes(
      x = Corrected_T_0m,
      y = LTE,
      group = Sequence,
      label = after_stat(
        sprintf(
          "y = %.1fx %+.1f\np = %s",
          b_1, b_0,
          ifelse(p.value < 0.001,
                 "<0.001",
                 sprintf("%.3f", p.value))
        )
      )
    ),
    formula = my.formula,
    output.type = "numeric",
    parse = FALSE,
    label.x = 0.23,
    label.y = 0.80,
    hjust = 0,
    size = 1.8
  )

All_Years_RHGR_seq3



fig_1b_RHGR <- ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(f1_rhgr, x = 0, y = 0, width = 0.65, height = 1) +          # base plot (left)
  draw_plot(All_Years_RHGR_seq3, x = 0.61, y = 0, width = 0.36, height = 1)  # overlay (right)

fig_1b_RHGR
```
