```{r Figure 1 and 3}
# ggsave("NEW_Fig3_RHGR_v1.pdf", plot=All_Years_RHGR_seq3, width=1.5, height=4, units ="in", bg = "transparent", dpi = 300, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")




```


```{r Figure 4}

# 1. Season / sequence lookup tables
season_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Season_letter, ~Season_num,
  "A", 2022,
  "B", 2023,
  "C", 2024,
  "D", 2025
)

# NOTE: seq_map is only used for the All_Years scatter plots (Figures 3/4),
# NOT for the slope figures — slopes use all collections across the full year
seq_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Season, ~Sequence, ~Sequence2,
  "A", "AA", "Fall",   "A", "AD", "Winter",   "A", "AH", "Spring",
  "B", "BC", "Fall",   "B", "BG", "Winter",   "B", "BI", "Spring",
  "C", "CD", "Fall",   "C", "CI", "Winter",   "C", "CM", "Spring",
  "D", "DD", "Fall",   "D", "DH", "Winter",   "D", "DO", "Spring"
)

# 2. Build corrected-temperature columns and attach to initial.ch 
temps_all <- Mean_all_collections %>%
  inner_join(season_map, by = c("Season" = "Season_num")) %>%
  rename(Season_chr = Season_letter) %>%
  mutate(
    Treatment_chr = as.character(Treatment),
    Plot_chr      = as.character(Plot),
    Sequence      = Collection
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(Season_chr, Sequence, Height, Plot_chr, Treatment_chr,
         Mean_Temp, ref_temp, Corrected_T)

# 2m summaries
temps_2m_plot <- temps_all %>%
  filter(Height == "2m") %>%
  dplyr::select(-Height) %>%
  rename(Corrected_T_2m = Corrected_T, ref_temp_2m = ref_temp)

temps_2m_trt <- temps_2m_plot %>%
  group_by(Season_chr, Sequence, Treatment_chr, Plot_chr) %>%
  summarise(
    Corrected_T_2m = mean(Corrected_T_2m, na.rm = TRUE),
    ref_temp_2m    = mean(ref_temp_2m,    na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 0m summaries
temps_0m_plot <- temps_all %>%
  filter(Height == "0m") %>%
  dplyr::select(-Height) %>%
  rename(Corrected_T_0m = Corrected_T, ref_temp_0m = ref_temp)

temps_0m_trt <- temps_0m_plot %>%
  group_by(Season_chr, Sequence, Treatment_chr, Plot_chr) %>%
  summarise(
    Corrected_T_0m = mean(Corrected_T_0m, na.rm = TRUE),
    ref_temp_0m    = mean(ref_temp_0m,    na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Join onto initial.ch
initial_keys <- initial.ch %>%
  mutate(
    Season_chr    = as.character(Season),
    Sequence      = as.character(Sequence),
    Treatment_chr = as.character(Treatment),
    Plot_chr      = dplyr::na_if(trimws(as.character(Plot)), "")
  )

initial.ch_joined <- initial_keys %>%
  left_join(temps_2m_plot, by = c("Season_chr", "Sequence", "Treatment_chr", "Plot_chr")) %>%
  left_join(temps_2m_trt,  by = c("Season_chr", "Sequence", "Treatment_chr", "Plot_chr"),
            suffix = c("_plot2m", "_trt2m")) %>%
  mutate(
    Corrected_T_2m = coalesce(Corrected_T_2m_plot2m, Corrected_T_2m_trt2m),
    ref_temp_2m    = coalesce(ref_temp_2m_plot2m,    ref_temp_2m_trt2m)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-ends_with("_plot2m"), -ends_with("_trt2m")) %>%
  left_join(temps_0m_plot, by = c("Season_chr", "Sequence", "Treatment_chr", "Plot_chr")) %>%
  left_join(temps_0m_trt,  by = c("Season_chr", "Sequence", "Treatment_chr", "Plot_chr"),
            suffix = c("_plot0m", "_trt0m")) %>%
  mutate(
    Corrected_T_0m = coalesce(Corrected_T_0m_plot0m, Corrected_T_0m_trt0m),
    ref_temp_0m    = coalesce(ref_temp_0m_plot0m,    ref_temp_0m_trt0m)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-ends_with("_plot0m"), -ends_with("_trt0m"))

# 3. Species datasets — filter Treatment but DO NOT inner_join seq_map 
# (seq_map inner_join would drop most collections, leaving very few slope points)

# LALA / PIMA — 2m temperature, all collections across the year
dat2 <- initial.ch_joined %>%
  filter(Species %in% c("LALA", "PIMA")) %>%
  mutate(Temperature = as.numeric(as.character(Treatment))) %>%
  filter(Temperature != -2.25)

# CHCA / RHGR — 0m temperature, all collections across the year
dat_un2 <- initial.ch_joined %>%
  filter(Species %in% c("CHCA", "RHGR")) %>%
  mutate(Temperature = as.numeric(as.character(Treatment))) %>%
  filter(Temperature != -2.25)

# 4. Compute slopes per Sequence × Date × Season × Species 

slopes_by_sequence_LALA_PIMA <- dat2 %>%
  group_by(Sequence, Date, Season, Species) %>%
  summarise(
    n_x_vals = n_distinct(Treatment),
    slope    = if (n_x_vals > 3) coef(lm(LTE ~ Corrected_T_2m))[2] else NA_real_,
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_x_vals >= 4) %>%
  mutate(
    Jday_shifted = ((yday(Date) - 182) %% 365) + 1,
    Season2 = case_when(
      month(Date) %in% c(12, 1, 2) ~ "Maintenance",
      month(Date) %in% 3:5         ~ "Deacclimation",
      month(Date) %in% 6:11        ~ "Acclimation",
      TRUE                         ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

slopes_by_sequence_CHCA_RHGR <- dat_un2 %>%
  group_by(Sequence, Date, Season, Species) %>%
  summarise(
    n_x_vals = n_distinct(Treatment),
    slope    = if (n_x_vals > 3) coef(lm(LTE ~ Corrected_T_0m))[2] else NA_real_,
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_x_vals >= 4) %>%
  mutate(
    Jday_shifted = ((yday(Date) - 182) %% 365) + 1,
    Season2 = case_when(
      month(Date) %in% c(12, 1, 2) ~ "Maintenance",
      month(Date) %in% 3:5         ~ "Deacclimation",
      month(Date) %in% 6:11        ~ "Acclimation",
      TRUE                         ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# 5. Shared aesthetics
shape_vals <- c("A" = 22, "B" = 23, "C" = 24, "D" = 25)
color_vals <- c(
  "Acclimation"   = "#A62800",
  "Deacclimation" = "#7CAE00",
  "Maintenance"   = "#0969A2"
)

# x-axis: Jul(1) → May(~325), matching Jday_shifted where Jul 1 = 1
x_axis_months <- scale_x_continuous(
  limits = c(1, 325),            # start from 1 (= Jul 1) to capture all data
  breaks = c(1, 32, 63, 93, 124, 154, 185, 216, 245, 275, 305, 336),
  labels = c("Jul", "", "Sep", "", "Nov", "", "Jan", "", "Mar", "", "May", ""),
  guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
)

base_theme <- theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    strip.background  = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    strip.text        = element_blank(),
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x       = element_line(linewidth = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y       = element_line(linewidth = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.ticks        = element_line(linewidth = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    panel.spacing     = unit(0, "lines")
  )

# 6. Slope figures 

fig_slopes_by_sequence_LALA_PIMA <- ggplot(slopes_by_sequence_LALA_PIMA,
                                            aes(Jday_shifted, slope)) +
  
  annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 1,    ymax = 2,  fill = "#b2182b", alpha = 0.1) +  # damage
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 0,    ymax = 1,    fill = "#fddbc7", alpha = 0.1) +  # less risk
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = 0,    fill = "#1a9850", alpha = 0.15) +  # no risk

  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 1,    ymax = 2,  fill = "#b2182b", alpha = 0.1) +  # damage
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 0,    ymax = 1,    fill = "#1a9850", alpha = 0.15) +  # less risk
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = 0,    fill = "white", alpha = 0.15) +  # no risk
  
  geom_line(aes(group = Season), color = "gray60", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = Season), size = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(color = Season2, fill = Season2, shape = Season), size = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "black",
              span = 1.0, linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.1) +
  x_axis_months +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-0.5, 2.2),
    breaks = seq(-0.5, 2, by = 0.5),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Season", values = shape_vals) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_vals) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = color_vals) +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "Slope") +
  facet_wrap(~ Species, ncol = 2, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    strip.background  = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.ticks        = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.spacing     = unit(0.5, "lines")
  )

fig_slopes_by_sequence_LALA_PIMA


fig_slopes_by_sequence_CHCA_RHGR <- ggplot(slopes_by_sequence_CHCA_RHGR,
                                            aes(Jday_shifted, slope)) +
  
  annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 1,    ymax = 4.1,  fill = "#b2182b", alpha = 0.1) +  # damage
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 0,    ymax = 1,    fill = "#fddbc7", alpha = 0.1) +  # less risk
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = 0,    fill = "#1a9850", alpha = 0.15) +  # no risk
 
  
  geom_line(aes(group = Season), color = "gray60", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = Season), size = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(color = Season2, fill = Season2, shape = Season), size = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "black",
              span = 1.0, linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.1) +
  x_axis_months +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-2.0, 4.5),
    breaks = c(-2.0, -1.0, 0.0, 1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 4.0),
    labels = c("-2.0", "-1.0", "0.0", "1.0", "2.0", "3.0", "4.0"),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Season", values = shape_vals) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_vals) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = color_vals) +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "Slope") +
  facet_wrap(~ Species, ncol = 2, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    strip.background  = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.ticks        = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.spacing     = unit(0.5, "lines")
  )

fig_slopes_by_sequence_CHCA_RHGR


# 7. Combined figure
fig_slopes_combined <- fig_slopes_by_sequence_LALA_PIMA |  fig_slopes_by_sequence_CHCA_RHGR

fig_slopes_combined


# ggsave("Fig4_v25_span1.pdf", plot=fig_slopes_combined, width=4.4, height=2.4, units ="in", bg = "transparent", dpi = 300, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")


```

```{r Fig 4 using Inter-Collection Mean Temperature }


# 1. Join Tmean_ic onto dat2 and dat_un2 (already have Sequence + Treatment)
dat2_ic <- dat2 %>%
  left_join(ic_temp_2m %>% mutate(Treatment = as.character(Treatment)),
            by = c("Sequence" = "Collection", "Treatment"))

dat_un2_ic <- dat_un2 %>%
  left_join(ic_temp_0m %>% mutate(Treatment = as.character(Treatment)),
            by = c("Sequence" = "Collection", "Treatment"))

# 2. Compute slopes using Tmean_ic as x (same structure as before)
slopes_ic_LALA_PIMA <- dat2_ic %>%
  group_by(Sequence, Date, Season, Species) %>%
  summarise(
    n_x_vals = n_distinct(Treatment),
    n_temp   = sum(!is.na(Tmean_ic)),
    slope    = if (n_x_vals > 3 & n_temp > 1) coef(lm(LTE ~ Tmean_ic))[2] else NA_real_,
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_x_vals >= 4) %>%
  mutate(
    Jday_shifted = ((yday(Date) - 182) %% 365) + 1,
    Season2 = case_when(
      month(Date) %in% c(12, 1, 2) ~ "Maintenance",
      month(Date) %in% 3:5         ~ "Deacclimation",
      month(Date) %in% 6:11        ~ "Acclimation",
      TRUE                         ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

slopes_ic_CHCA_RHGR <- dat_un2_ic %>%
  group_by(Sequence, Date, Season, Species) %>%
  summarise(
    n_x_vals = n_distinct(Treatment),
    n_temp   = sum(!is.na(Tmean_ic)),
    slope    = if (n_x_vals > 3 & n_temp > 1) coef(lm(LTE ~ Tmean_ic))[2] else NA_real_,
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_x_vals >= 4) %>%
  mutate(
    Jday_shifted = ((yday(Date) - 182) %% 365) + 1,
    Season2 = case_when(
      month(Date) %in% c(12, 1, 2) ~ "Maintenance",
      month(Date) %in% 3:5         ~ "Deacclimation",
      month(Date) %in% 6:11        ~ "Acclimation",
      TRUE                         ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

slopes_ic_CHCA_RHGR <- slopes_ic_CHCA_RHGR %>%
  filter(Sequence != "AF")


# 3. Figures — reuse all the same aesthetics as fig_slopes_combined
fig_slopes_ic_LALA_PIMA <- ggplot(slopes_ic_LALA_PIMA, aes(Jday_shifted, slope)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = Season), color = "gray60", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = Season), size = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(color = Season2, fill = Season2, shape = Season), size = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "black", span = 1.0, linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.1) +
  x_axis_months +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.5, 2.2), breaks = seq(-0.5, 2, by = 0.5),
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")) +
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Season", values = shape_vals) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_vals) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = color_vals) +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "Slope (LTE ~ Tmean_ic)") +
  facet_wrap(~ Species, ncol = 2, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    strip.background  = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.ticks        = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.spacing     = unit(1, "lines")
  )

fig_slopes_ic_LALA_PIMA


fig_slopes_ic_LALA_PIMA <- ggplot(slopes_ic_LALA_PIMA,
                                            aes(Jday_shifted, slope)) +
  
  annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 1,    ymax = 2.0,  fill = "#b2182b", alpha = 0.1) +  # damage
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 0,    ymax = 1,    fill = "#fddbc7", alpha = 0.1) +  # less risk
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = 0,    fill = "#1a9850", alpha = 0.15) +  # no risk
 
  
  geom_line(aes(group = Season), color = "gray60", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = Season), size = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(color = Season2, fill = Season2, shape = Season), size = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "black",
              span = 1.0, linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.1) +
  x_axis_months +
  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.5, 2.2), breaks = seq(-0.5, 2, by = 0.5),
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")) +
  
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Season", values = shape_vals) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_vals) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = color_vals) +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "Slope (LTE ~ Tmean_ic)") +
  facet_wrap(~ Species, ncol = 2, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    strip.background  = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.ticks        = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.spacing     = unit(0.5, "lines")
  )

fig_slopes_ic_LALA_PIMA


fig_slopes_ic_CHCA_RHGR <- ggplot(slopes_ic_CHCA_RHGR,
                                            aes(Jday_shifted, slope)) +
  
  annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 1,    ymax = 6.2,  fill = "#b2182b", alpha = 0.1) +  # damage
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 0,    ymax = 1,    fill = "#fddbc7", alpha = 0.1) +  # less risk
  # annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = 0,    fill = "#1a9850", alpha = 0.15) +  # no risk
 
  
  geom_line(aes(group = Season), color = "gray60", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = Season), size = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(color = Season2, fill = Season2, shape = Season), size = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "black",
              span = 1.0, linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = 2, linewidth = 0.1) +
  x_axis_months +
  
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-4, 6.2),
                     breaks = c(-4.0, -2.0, -1.0, 0.0, 1.0, 2, 4.0, 6.0),
                     labels = c("-4.0", "-2.0", "-1.0", "0.0", "1.0", "2.0", "4.0", "6.0"),
                     guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")) +
  
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Season", values = shape_vals) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_vals) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = color_vals) +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "Slope (LTE ~ Tmean_ic)") +
  facet_wrap(~ Species, ncol = 2, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    strip.background  = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.ticks        = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    panel.spacing     = unit(0.5, "lines")
  )

fig_slopes_ic_CHCA_RHGR



fig_slopes_ic_combined <- fig_slopes_ic_LALA_PIMA | fig_slopes_ic_CHCA_RHGR
fig_slopes_ic_combined


# ggsave("fig_slopes_ic_combined_v5.pdf", plot=fig_slopes_ic_combined, width=4.4, height=2.4, units ="in", bg = "transparent", dpi = 300, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")




```



```{r Supp Figure 1. Distribution of winter temperatures}

# Mean winter temperature at 2m

# Subset winter months: December, January, February
winter_2m <- wdat_2b %>% filter(Month %in% c(12, 1, 2))

# Mean winter temperature per plot and treatment
mean_winter_2m <- winter_2m %>%
  group_by(Plot, Treatment) %>%
  summarise(Mean_Temp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(Sensor_Height = "2m")


winter_2m$Treatment <- factor(
  winter_2m$Treatment,
  levels = c(9, 6.75, 4.5, 2.25, 0, -2.25),
  labels = c("+9°C", "+6.75°C", "+4.5°C", "+2.25°C", "0°C", "Amb")
)

winter_2m_fig <- ggplot(winter_2m, aes(x = Temp, y = as.factor(Treatment), fill = as.factor(Treatment))) +
 
   geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.4, rel_min_height = 0.01, color = "white") +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#990000", "#CC3366", "#FFCC00", "#99CC33", "#009999","#333366")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#990000", "#CC3366", "#FFCC00", "#99CC33", "#009999","#333366")) +
  

    scale_y_discrete(guide = guide_axis(theme = NULL, minor.ticks = F, cap = "both")) +


  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(-42,22), breaks=seq(-40,20,10),
                   guide = guide_axis(theme = NULL, minor.ticks = T, cap = "both"))+

  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "Distribution of Winter Temperatures (°C) \nat 2m",
    y = "Treatment"
  ) +
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 7) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, 'lines')
  )

winter_2m_fig


# ggsave("winter_2m_fig_v6.pdf", plot=winter_2m_fig   , width=2.3, height=3, units ="in", bg = "transparent", dpi = 600, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")


# Mean winter temperature at 0m

winter_0m <- wdat_0b %>% filter(Month %in% c(12, 1, 2))

mean_winter_0m <- winter_0m %>%
  group_by(Plot, Treatment) %>%
  summarise(Mean_Temp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(Sensor_Height = "0m")


winter_0m$Treatment <- factor(
  winter_0m$Treatment,
  levels = c(9, 6.75, 4.5, 2.25, 0, -2.25),
  labels = c("+9°C", "+6.75°C", "+4.5°C", "+2.25°C", "0°C", "Amb")
)

winter_0m_fig <- ggplot(winter_0m, aes(x = Temp, y = as.factor(Treatment), fill = as.factor(Treatment))) +
 
   geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.4, rel_min_height = 0.01, color = "white") +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#990000", "#CC3366", "#FFCC00", "#99CC33", "#009999","#333366")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#990000", "#CC3366", "#FFCC00", "#99CC33", "#009999","#333366")) +
  

    scale_y_discrete(guide = guide_axis(theme = NULL, minor.ticks = F, cap = "both")) +


  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(-21,11), breaks=c(-20,-10,0,10),
                   guide = guide_axis(theme = NULL, minor.ticks = T, cap = "both"))+


  
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "Distribution of Winter Temperatures (°C) \nat surface level",
    y = "Treatment"
  ) +
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 7) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, 'lines')
  )

winter_0m_fig

# ggsave("winter_0m_fig_v6.pdf", plot=winter_0m_fig   , width=2.3, height=3, units ="in", bg = "transparent", dpi = 600, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")


winter_2m_fig+winter_0m_fig

```

``` {r Supp Figure 3.  ICH + weather}
#### Supp Figure 1 

f1_lala <- ggplot()+
 
      geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#333366", fill = "#333366") +

        geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "9")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#990000", fill = "#990000") +

        geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#333366", stat="summary") +
  
        geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "9")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#990000", stat="summary") +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, size=0.2, lty=3)+

  
    geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "A"), Species %in% "LALA"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "A"), Species %in% "LALA"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "A"), Species %in% "LALA"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
  geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "B"), Species %in% "LALA"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "B"), Species %in% "LALA"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "B"), Species %in% "LALA"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
   geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "LALA"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "LALA"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "LALA"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
  geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "D"), Species %in% "LALA"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "D"), Species %in% "LALA"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "D"), Species %in% "LALA"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  # ylab("Temperature (°C)")+
  ylab("")+
  xlab("") +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b", date_breaks = "2 month", ,guide=guide_axis_truncated())+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-40, 50), breaks = c(-40, -35, -30, -25, -20, -15, -10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30,35,40, 45, 50),
                     labels = c(-40,"",-30, "", -20, "", -10, "", 0, "", 10, "", 20, "", 30,"", 45,"", 50), expand = c(0, 0), guide=guide_axis_truncated()) + 
  
  
 theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    legend.key.size = unit(1, 'lines'),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, 'lines'),        
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = c("black"), angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5))+
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(as.Date("2021-08-15"), as.Date("2025-05-30")), ylim = c(-40, 50), expand = TRUE, default = FALSE, clip = "on")


f1_lala


f1_pima <- ggplot()+

      geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#333366", fill = "#333366") +

        geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "9")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#990000", fill = "#990000") +



            geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#333366", stat="summary") +
  
          geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_2b, Treatment %in% "9")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#990000", stat="summary") +
  

    geom_hline(yintercept=0, size=0.2, lty=3)+

  
    geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "A"), Species %in% "PIMA"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "A"), Species %in% "PIMA"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "A"), Species %in% "PIMA"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
  geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "B"), Species %in% "PIMA"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "B"), Species %in% "PIMA"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "B"), Species %in% "PIMA"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
  
   geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "PIMA"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "PIMA"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "PIMA"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
  geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "D"), Species %in% "PIMA"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "D"), Species %in% "PIMA"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "D"), Species %in% "PIMA"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
  
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  # ylab("Temperature (°C)")+
  ylab("")+
  xlab("") +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b", date_breaks = "2 month", ,guide=guide_axis_truncated())+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-40, 50), breaks = c(-40, -35, -30, -25, -20, -15, -10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30,35,40, 45, 50),
                     labels = c(-40,"",-30, "", -20, "", -10, "", 0, "", 10, "", 20, "", 30,"", 45,"", 50), expand = c(0, 0), guide=guide_axis_truncated()) +  # facet_wrap(.~Treatment)+
  
  
  
 theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    legend.key.size = unit(1, 'lines'),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, 'lines'),        
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = c("black"), angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5))+
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(as.Date("2021-08-15"), as.Date("2025-05-30")), ylim = c(-40, 50), expand = TRUE, default = FALSE, clip = "on")


f1_pima

f1_chca <- ggplot()+
 
      geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#333366", fill = "#333366") +

        geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "9")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#990000", fill = "#990000") +

        geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#333366", stat="summary") +
  
        geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "9")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#990000", stat="summary") +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, size=0.2, lty=3)+

  
    geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "A"), Species %in% "CHCA"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "A"), Species %in% "CHCA"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "A"), Species %in% "CHCA"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
  geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "B"), Species %in% "CHCA"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "B"), Species %in% "CHCA"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "B"), Species %in% "CHCA"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
   geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "CHCA"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "CHCA"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "CHCA"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
  geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "D"), Species %in% "CHCA"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "D"), Species %in% "CHCA"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "D"), Species %in% "CHCA"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  # ylab("Temperature (°C)")+
  ylab("")+
  xlab("") +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b", date_breaks = "2 month", ,guide=guide_axis_truncated())+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-40, 50), breaks = c(-40, -35, -30, -25, -20, -15, -10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30,35,40, 45, 50),
                     labels = c(-40,"",-30, "", -20, "", -10, "", 0, "", 10, "", 20, "", 30,"", 45,"", 50), expand = c(0, 0), guide=guide_axis_truncated()) + 
  
  
 theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    legend.key.size = unit(1, 'lines'),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, 'lines'),        
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = c("black"), angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5))+
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(as.Date("2021-08-15"), as.Date("2025-05-30")), ylim = c(-40, 50), expand = TRUE, default = FALSE, clip = "on")


f1_chca


f1_rhgr <- ggplot()+
 
      geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#333366", fill = "#333366") +

        geom_ribbon(aes(x = as.Date(Date), ymax = Tmax, ymin = Tmin), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "9")), lty = 1, lwd = 0.05, alpha = 0.2, color = "#990000", fill = "#990000") +

        geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "-2.25")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#333366", stat="summary") +
  
        geom_line(aes(x = as.Date(Date), y = Temp), data = subset(subset(wdat_0b, Treatment %in% "9")), size=0.3, alpha=0.8, color = "#990000", stat="summary") +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, size=0.2, lty=3)+

  
    geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "A"), Species %in% "RHGR"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "A"), Species %in% "RHGR"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "A"), Species %in% "RHGR"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
  geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "B"), Species %in% "RHGR"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "B"), Species %in% "RHGR"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "B"), Species %in% "RHGR"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
   geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "RHGR"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "RHGR"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "C"), Species %in% "RHGR"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
  geom_smooth(aes(x = Date, y = LTE,  color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "D"), Species %in% "RHGR"), size=0.3, method = "loess", stat = "summary", se=F) +
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, group = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "D"), Species %in% "RHGR"), stat="summary", size=0.7, shape=21, color="black")+
      geom_point(aes(x = Date, y = LTE, color = as.factor(Treatment)), data = subset(subset(initial.ch, Season %in% "D"), Species %in% "RHGR"), stat="summary", size=0.5)+
  
  
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  # ylab("Temperature (°C)")+
  ylab("")+
  xlab("") +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b", date_breaks = "2 month", ,guide=guide_axis_truncated())+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-40, 50), breaks = c(-40, -35, -30, -25, -20, -15, -10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30,35,40, 45, 50),
                     labels = c(-40,"",-30, "", -20, "", -10, "", 0, "", 10, "", 20, "", 30,"", 45,"", 50), expand = c(0, 0), guide=guide_axis_truncated()) + 
  
  
 theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    legend.key.size = unit(1, 'lines'),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.20, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, 'lines'),        
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = c("black"), angle = 45, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5))+
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(as.Date("2021-08-15"), as.Date("2025-05-30")), ylim = c(-40, 50), expand = TRUE, default = FALSE, clip = "on")


f1_rhgr


f1_lala/plot_spacer()/f1_pima/plot_spacer()/f1_chca/plot_spacer()/f1_rhgr+plot_layout(heights=c(1, 0.03, 1, 0.03, 1, 0.03, 1))

# Compose the plot
combined_plot <- f1_lala/f1_pima/f1_chca/f1_rhgr+plot_layout(heights=c(1, 1, 1, 1))

# Save the plot
# ggsave("Fig1_ICH_all_species_v5.pdf", plot = combined_plot, width = 6.0, height = 7, units = "in", dpi = 300, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")



```


```{r Supp Figure 5 PIMA and RHGR Season C subset}

seq_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Season, ~Sequence, ~Sequence2,

  "C", "CD", "Fall",  "C", "CF", "Winter",  "C", "CH", "Winter", "C", "CM", "Spring",

)


trt_colors <- c(
  "-2.25" = "#333366",
  "0"     = "#009999",
  "2.25"  = "#99CC33",
  "4.5"   = "#FFCC00",
  "6.75"  = "#CC3366",
  "9"     = "#990000"
)
trt_levels <- c("-2.25", "0", "2.25", "4.5", "6.75", "9")



# DATA PREP — PIMA (2m) and RHGR (0m)

prep_species <- function(data, species_code, corrected_col) {
  dat <- data %>%
    filter(Species == species_code) %>%
    mutate(Temperature    = as.numeric(as.character(Treatment)),
           Corrected_T    = as.numeric(as.character(.data[[corrected_col]])))

  dat_mean <- dat %>%
    group_by(Season, Date, Treatment, Collection, Sequence, Temperature, Species,
             Corrected_T) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(LT50 = mean(LTE, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

  dat2      <- dat      %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)
  dat_mean2 <- dat_mean %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)

  dat_main  <- dat %>%
    inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence")) %>%
    mutate(Sequence2       = factor(Sequence2, levels = c("Fall","Winter","Spring")),
           !!corrected_col := ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, 0, .data[[corrected_col]]),
           Corrected_T_plot = ifelse(.data[[corrected_col]] == 0, -1.8,
                                     .data[[corrected_col]]))

  dat_main2 <- dat2 %>%
    inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence")) %>%
    mutate(Sequence2       = factor(Sequence2, levels = c("Fall","Winter","Spring")),
           !!corrected_col := ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, 0, .data[[corrected_col]]),
           Corrected_T_plot = ifelse(.data[[corrected_col]] == 0, -1.8,
                                     .data[[corrected_col]]))

  list(main = dat_main, main2 = dat_main2)
}

pima_data <- prep_species(initial.ch2, "PIMA", "Corrected_T_2m")
rhgr_data <- prep_species(initial.ch2, "RHGR", "Corrected_T_0m")

# Combine into one data frame, label species and corrected T column uniformly
dat_combined <- bind_rows(
  pima_data$main  %>% mutate(Species_label = "Black spruce"),
  rhgr_data$main  %>% mutate(Species_label = "Labrador tea")
) %>%
  mutate(
    Species_label = factor(Species_label,
                           levels = c("Black spruce", "Labrador tea")),
    Sequence2     = factor(Sequence2,
                           levels = c("Fall", "Winter", "Spring")),
    Treatment     = factor(as.character(Treatment), levels = trt_levels)
  )

dat_combined2 <- bind_rows(
  pima_data$main2 %>% mutate(Species_label = "Black spruce"),
  rhgr_data$main2 %>% mutate(Species_label = "Labrador tea")
) %>%
  mutate(
    Species_label = factor(Species_label,
                           levels = c("Black spruce", "Labrador tea")),
    Sequence2     = factor(Sequence2,
                           levels = c("Fall", "Winter", "Spring")),
    Treatment     = factor(as.character(Treatment), levels = trt_levels)
  )



# FIGURE — coloured by Sequence2 (phase)
# Rows = Sequence (collection), Columns = Species

fig_PIMA_RHGR_phase <- ggplot() +

  geom_beeswarm(
    data = dat_combined,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE,
        col = Sequence2, fill = Sequence2, shape = CO2),
    stroke = 0.1, size = 0.7, alpha = 0.5, priority = "density"
  ) +

  geom_smooth(
    data = dat_combined2,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE, group = Sequence2),
    size = 0.6, method = "lm", formula = my.formula,
    se = FALSE, color = "black", linetype = "solid"
  ) +

  stat_summary(
    data = dat_combined,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 1.5, color = "black"
  ) +

  stat_summary(
    data = dat_combined,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE,
        color = Sequence2, fill = Sequence2, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 1.2
  ) +

  # Regression equations
  stat_poly_eq(
    data = dat_combined2,
    aes(
      x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE,
      group = Sequence2,
      label = after_stat(sprintf(
        "y = %.1fx %+.1f\np = %s", b_1, b_0,
        ifelse(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p.value))))
    ),
    formula     = my.formula,
    output.type = "numeric",
    parse       = FALSE,
    label.x     = 0.05,
    label.y     = 0.95,
    hjust       = 0,
    size        = 2.5
  ) +

  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2, size = 0.1) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(-1.8, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9, 11.25),
    labels = c("", "0.0", "", "4.5", "", "9.0", ""),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-40, 0, 10),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 12), ylim = c(-40, 0)) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c("#A62800", "#0969A2", "#7CAE00"),
                     name   = "Phase") +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c("#A62800", "#0969A2", "#7CAE00"),
                    name    = "Phase") +

  # Rows = collection (proxy for phase), Columns = species
  facet_grid(Sequence ~ Species_label, axes="all") +

  labs(
    x = expression(paste("Plot temperature (", Delta, italic("T"), ", °C)")),
    y = "Cold hardiness (°C)"
  )+
  
   theme_bw(base_size = 5.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 5.5),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size=5.5),
    panel.spacing    = unit(0.15, "lines")   # <<< this increases space between facets

  )

fig_PIMA_RHGR_phase

# ggsave("fig_PIMA_RHGR_phasev6.pdf", plot=fig_PIMA_RHGR_phase, width=4, height=4.5, units ="in", bg = "transparent", dpi = 300, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")


# FIGURE — same layout but coloured by Treatment

fig_PIMA_RHGR_trt <- ggplot() +

  geom_beeswarm(
    data = dat_combined,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE,
        col = Treatment, fill = Treatment, shape = Sequence2),
    stroke = 0.1, size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, priority = "density"
  ) +

  geom_smooth(
    data = dat_combined2,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE, group = Sequence2),
    size = 0.6, method = "lm", formula = my.formula,
    se = FALSE, color = "black", linetype = "solid"
  ) +

  stat_summary(
    data = dat_combined,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE, shape = Sequence2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 0.9, color = "black"
  ) +

  stat_summary(
    data = dat_combined,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE,
        color = Treatment, fill = Treatment, shape = Sequence2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 0.7
  ) +

  # Regression equations
  stat_poly_eq(
    data = dat_combined2,
    aes(
      x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE,
      group = Sequence2,
      label = after_stat(sprintf(
        "y = %.1fx %+.1f\np = %s", b_1, b_0,
        ifelse(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p.value))))
    ),
    formula     = my.formula,
    output.type = "numeric",
    parse       = FALSE,
    label.x     = 0.05,
    label.y     = 0.95,
    hjust       = 0,
    size        = 1.5
  ) +

  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2, size = 0.1) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(-1.8, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9, 11.25),
    labels = c("", "0.0", "", "4.5", "", "9.0", ""),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-35, -5, 10),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 11), ylim = c(-40, -2)) +

  scale_color_manual(values = trt_colors, name = "Treatment (°C)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = trt_colors, name = "Treatment (°C)") +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("Fall" = 24, "Winter" = 21, "Spring" = 25),
    name   = "Phase"
  ) +

  facet_grid(Sequence ~ Species_label) +

  labs(
    x = expression(paste("Plot temperature (", Delta, italic("T"), ", °C)")),
    y = "Cold hardiness (°C)"
  )+
  
   theme_bw(base_size = 5.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 5.5),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size=5.5),
    panel.spacing    = unit(0.15, "lines")   # <<< this increases space between facets

  )


fig_PIMA_RHGR_trt


```

```{r Supp Figure 5 All Species Season C subset}

seq_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Season, ~Sequence, ~Sequence2,

  "C", "CD", "Fall",  "C", "CG", "Winter",  "C", "CH", "Winter", "C", "CM", "Spring",

)


trt_colors <- c(
  "-2.25" = "#333366",
  "0"     = "#009999",
  "2.25"  = "#99CC33",
  "4.5"   = "#FFCC00",
  "6.75"  = "#CC3366",
  "9"     = "#990000"
)
trt_levels <- c("-2.25", "0", "2.25", "4.5", "6.75", "9")



# DATA PREP — PIMA (2m) and RHGR (0m)

prep_species <- function(data, species_code, corrected_col) {
  dat <- data %>%
    filter(Species == species_code) %>%
    mutate(Temperature    = as.numeric(as.character(Treatment)),
           Corrected_T    = as.numeric(as.character(.data[[corrected_col]])))

  dat_mean <- dat %>%
    group_by(Season, Date, Treatment, Collection, Sequence, Temperature, Species,
             Corrected_T) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(LT50 = mean(LTE, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

  dat2      <- dat      %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)
  dat_mean2 <- dat_mean %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)

  dat_main  <- dat %>%
    inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence")) %>%
    mutate(Sequence2       = factor(Sequence2, levels = c("Fall","Winter","Spring")),
           !!corrected_col := ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, 0, .data[[corrected_col]]),
           Corrected_T_plot = ifelse(.data[[corrected_col]] == 0, -1.8,
                                     .data[[corrected_col]]))

  dat_main2 <- dat2 %>%
    inner_join(seq_map, by = c("Season", "Sequence")) %>%
    mutate(Sequence2       = factor(Sequence2, levels = c("Fall","Winter","Spring")),
           !!corrected_col := ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, 0, .data[[corrected_col]]),
           Corrected_T_plot = ifelse(.data[[corrected_col]] == 0, -1.8,
                                     .data[[corrected_col]]))

  list(main = dat_main, main2 = dat_main2)
}

lala_data <- prep_species(initial.ch2, "LALA", "Corrected_T_2m")
pima_data <- prep_species(initial.ch2, "PIMA", "Corrected_T_2m")

chca_data <- prep_species(initial.ch2, "CHCA", "Corrected_T_0m")
rhgr_data <- prep_species(initial.ch2, "RHGR", "Corrected_T_0m")



# Combine into one data frame, label species and corrected T column uniformly
dat_combined <- bind_rows(
  lala_data$main  %>% mutate(Species_label = "American larch"),
  pima_data$main  %>% mutate(Species_label = "Black spruce"),
  chca_data$main  %>% mutate(Species_label = "Leatherleaf"),
  rhgr_data$main  %>% mutate(Species_label = "Labrador tea")
) %>%
  mutate(
    Species_label = factor(Species_label,
                           levels = c("American larch","Black spruce", "Leatherleaf","Labrador tea")),
    Sequence2     = factor(Sequence2,
                           levels = c("Fall", "Winter", "Spring")),
    Treatment     = factor(as.character(Treatment), levels = trt_levels)
  )

dat_combined2 <- bind_rows(
  lala_data$main2  %>% mutate(Species_label = "American larch"),
  pima_data$main2  %>% mutate(Species_label = "Black spruce"),
  chca_data$main2  %>% mutate(Species_label = "Leatherleaf"),
  rhgr_data$main2 %>% mutate(Species_label = "Labrador tea")
) %>%
  mutate(
    Species_label = factor(Species_label,
                           levels = c("American larch","Black spruce", "Leatherleaf","Labrador tea")),
    Sequence2     = factor(Sequence2,
                           levels = c("Fall", "Winter", "Spring")),
    Treatment     = factor(as.character(Treatment), levels = trt_levels)
  )



# FIGURE — coloured by Sequence2 (phase)
# Rows = Sequence (collection), Columns = Species

fig_all_species_phase <- ggplot() +

  geom_beeswarm(
    data = dat_combined,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE,
        col = Sequence2, fill = Sequence2, shape = CO2),
    stroke = 0.1, size = 0.7, alpha = 0.5, priority = "density"
  ) +

  geom_smooth(
    data = dat_combined2,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE, group = Sequence2),
    size = 0.6, method = "lm", formula = my.formula,
    se = FALSE, color = "black", linetype = "solid"
  ) +

  stat_summary(
    data = dat_combined,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 1.5, color = "black"
  ) +

  stat_summary(
    data = dat_combined,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE,
        color = Sequence2, fill = Sequence2, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 1.2
  ) +

  # Regression equations
  stat_poly_eq(
    data = dat_combined2,
    aes(
      x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE,
      group = Sequence2,
      label = after_stat(sprintf(
        "y = %.1fx %+.1f\np = %s", b_1, b_0,
        ifelse(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p.value))))
    ),
    formula     = my.formula,
    output.type = "numeric",
    parse       = FALSE,
    label.x     = 0.05,
    label.y     = 0.95,
    hjust       = 0,
    size        = 2.5
  ) +

  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2, size = 0.1) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(-1.8, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9, 11.25),
    labels = c("", "0.0", "", "4.5", "", "9.0", ""),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-40, 0, 10),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 12), ylim = c(-40, 0)) +

  # scale_color_manual(values = c("#A62800", "#0969A2", "#7CAE00"),
  #                    name   = "Phase") +
  # scale_fill_manual(values  = c("#A62800", "#0969A2", "#7CAE00"),
  #                   name    = "Phase") +

  # Rows = collection (proxy for phase), Columns = species
  facet_grid(Sequence ~ Species_label, axes="all") +

  labs(
    x = expression(paste("Plot temperature (", Delta, italic("T"), ", °C)")),
    y = "Cold hardiness (°C)"
  )+
  
   theme_bw(base_size = 5.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    # strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 5.5),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size=5.5),
    panel.spacing    = unit(0.15, "lines")   # <<< this increases space between facets

  )

fig_all_species_phase

# ggsave("fig_all_species_phase)v1.pdf", plot=fig_all_species_phase, width=6, height=4.5, units ="in", bg = "transparent", dpi = 300, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")


# FIGURE — same layout but coloured by Treatment

fig_PIMA_RHGR_trt <- ggplot() +

  geom_beeswarm(
    data = dat_combined,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE,
        col = Treatment, fill = Treatment, shape = Sequence2),
    stroke = 0.1, size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, priority = "density"
  ) +

  geom_smooth(
    data = dat_combined2,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE, group = Sequence2),
    size = 0.6, method = "lm", formula = my.formula,
    se = FALSE, color = "black", linetype = "solid"
  ) +

  stat_summary(
    data = dat_combined,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE, shape = Sequence2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 0.9, color = "black"
  ) +

  stat_summary(
    data = dat_combined,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE,
        color = Treatment, fill = Treatment, shape = Sequence2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 0.7
  ) +

  # Regression equations
  stat_poly_eq(
    data = dat_combined2,
    aes(
      x = Corrected_T_plot, y = LTE,
      group = Sequence2,
      label = after_stat(sprintf(
        "y = %.1fx %+.1f\np = %s", b_1, b_0,
        ifelse(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001", sprintf("%.3f", p.value))))
    ),
    formula     = my.formula,
    output.type = "numeric",
    parse       = FALSE,
    label.x     = 0.05,
    label.y     = 0.95,
    hjust       = 0,
    size        = 1.5
  ) +

  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2, size = 0.1) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(-1.8, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9, 11.25),
    labels = c("", "0.0", "", "4.5", "", "9.0", ""),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-35, -5, 10),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 11), ylim = c(-40, -2)) +

  scale_color_manual(values = trt_colors, name = "Treatment (°C)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = trt_colors, name = "Treatment (°C)") +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("Fall" = 24, "Winter" = 21, "Spring" = 25),
    name   = "Phase"
  ) +

  facet_grid(Sequence ~ Species_label) +

  labs(
    x = expression(paste("Plot temperature (", Delta, italic("T"), ", °C)")),
    y = "Cold hardiness (°C)"
  )+
  
   theme_bw(base_size = 5.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 5.5),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size=5.5),
    panel.spacing    = unit(0.15, "lines")   # <<< this increases space between facets

  )


fig_PIMA_RHGR_trt


```

```{r Supp Figure 6. Distribution of December temperatures at 2m}
# Subset winter months: December, January, February
winter_2m_v2 <- wdat_2b %>% filter(Month %in% c(12))

winter_2m_v2 <- winter_2m_v2 %>% filter(Season %in% c(2022, 2023, 2024, 2025))


# Mean winter temperature per plot and treatment
mean_winter_2m_v2 <- winter_2m_v2 %>%
  group_by(Plot, Treatment, Season) %>%
  summarise(Mean_Temp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(Sensor_Height = "2m")

winter_2m_v2$Treatment <- factor(
winter_2m_v2$Treatment,
  levels = c(-2.25, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9),
  labels = c("Amb", "0°C", "+2.25°C", "+4.5°C", "+6.75°C", "+9°C")
)

winter_2m_v2$Season <- factor(
winter_2m_v2$Season,
  levels = c(2025, 2024, 2023, 2022),
  labels = c("24-25", "23-24", "22-23", "21-22")
)


winter_2m_v2_fig <- ggplot(winter_2m_v2, aes(x = Temp, y = as.factor(Season), fill = Treatment)) +
 
   geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.4, rel_min_height = 0.01, color = "white") +
  
scale_color_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+

    scale_y_discrete(guide = guide_axis(theme = NULL, minor.ticks = F, cap = "both")) +


  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(-31,21), breaks=seq(-30,20,10),
                   guide = guide_axis(theme = NULL, minor.ticks = T, cap = "both"))+

  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "Distribution of December Temperatures (°C) \nat 2m",
    y = "Season"
  ) +
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 7) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, 'lines')
  )

winter_2m_v2_fig


# How many days were the treatments experiencing temperatures above 0C?

days_above_0_2024 <- wdat_2b %>%
  filter(Month == 12, Season == 2023) %>%
  group_by(Treatment, Date) %>%
  summarise(Daily_Mean = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarise(
    Days_Above_0 = sum(Daily_Mean > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    Total_Days   = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

days_above_0_2024



```


```{r Supp Figure 8 and 9 ICH by collection LALA & PIMA}

axes_scales <- list(
  
    scale_x_continuous(
      # limits = c(-2, 13),
      breaks = c(-1.8, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9, 11.25),
      labels = c("Amb", "+0°C", "+2.25°C", "+4.5°C", "+6.75°C", "+9°C", "+11.25°C"),
      guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")
      ),
    
  scale_y_continuous(
    # limits = c(-50, 0),
    breaks = c(-50, -40, -35, -25, -15, -5, 0, 5),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ),
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2, size = 0.1),
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000")),
  labs(
    y = "Cold hardiness (°C)",
    x = expression(paste("Plot temperature (",Delta, italic("T"),", °C)"))
  ) 
    + coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 12), ylim = c(-40, 5))
)

base_theme <- theme_bw(base_size = 5.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    strip.background  = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    strip.text        = element_text(size = 5.5, color = "black"),
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 5.5),
    axis.ticks        = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size=5.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "lines")
  )

#Filtering when there is just more than 3 treatments
  
dat <- initial.ch_joined %>%
  filter(Species %in% c("LALA", "PIMA")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Temperature = as.numeric(as.character(Treatment)),
    Corrected_T = Corrected_T_2m  # or pick Corrected_T_2m / _0m explicitly
  )

dat_mean <- dat %>%
  group_by(Season, Date, Treatment, Collection, Sequence, Temperature, Species, Corrected_T, Corrected_T_2m) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(LT50 = mean(LTE, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")



dat2       <- dat      %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)
dat_mean2  <- dat_mean %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)
# Choose multiple seasons at once
season_pick <- c("A", "B", "C", "D")


keep_seq <- dat %>%
  filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "LALA") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Treatment), !is.na(LTE)) %>%             # guard against NAs
  group_by(Sequence) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(n_trt = n_distinct(Treatment), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n_trt >= 4) %>%
  pull(Sequence)

# 2) Make filtered tibbles you’ll reuse in all layers
dat_filt      <- dat       %>% filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "LALA", Sequence %in% keep_seq)
dat_mean2_filt<- dat_mean2 %>% filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "LALA", Sequence %in% keep_seq)
dat2_filt     <- dat2      %>% filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "LALA", Sequence %in% keep_seq)


dat_filt  <- dat_filt  %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_2m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, -1.8, Corrected_T_2m))

dat_mean2_filt <- dat_mean2_filt %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_2m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, -1.8, Corrected_T_2m))

str(dat_filt)

# 3) Plot (unchanged aesthetics, but using the filtered data)
p_season_LALA <- ggplot() +
  geom_smooth(
    data = dat_mean2_filt,
    # aes(x = Corrected_T, y = LT50, group = 1),
    aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LT50, group = 1),
    color = "black", size = 0.5, method = "lm", formula = my.formula
  ) +
  # geom_beeswarm(
  #   data = dat_filt,
  #   # aes(x = Corrected_T, y = LTE, col = Treatment),
  #   aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, col = Treatment, shape=CO2),
  #   stroke = 0.1, size = 1.2, cex = 1, priority = "density", alpha = 0.6
  # ) +
  
  geom_beeswarm(
  data = dat_filt,
  aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, col = Treatment, shape = CO2),
  stroke = 0.1, size = 1.2, cex = 1,
  priority = "ascending",  # or "descending" or "random"
  alpha = 0.6
)+


  stat_summary(
    data = dat_filt,
    # aes(x = Corrected_T, y = LTE),
    aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, shape=CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 2.4, color = "black"
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    data = dat_filt,
    # aes(x = Corrected_T, y = LTE, col = Treatment),
    aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, col = Treatment, shape=CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Species + Collection, ncol = 6) +
  axes_scales +
  base_theme

p_season_LALA

# Optional: equations/p-values using the same filtered set
Year_LALA <- p_season_LALA +
  stat_poly_eq(
    data  = dat2_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, group = Sequence,
        label = after_stat(tolower(p.value.label)) ),
    label.x = 0.3, label.y = 0.80, size = 1, formula = my.formula
  ) +
  stat_regline_equation(
    data = dat2_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, group = Sequence),
    size = 1.5, label.x = 0.9, label.y = -4
  )

Year_LALA


dat2_filt <- dat2_filt %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Sequence = as.factor(Sequence),
    Corrected_T_2m = as.numeric(Corrected_T_2m)
  )


# Build strip colors matched to Season (top strips in facet_wrap2)
# Each panel label is "Season: Collection", so we need one color per panel
panel_seasons <- dat_filt %>%
  arrange(Season, Date) %>%
  distinct(Season, Date) %>%
  mutate(Season = factor(Season, levels = c("A","B","C","D")))

# season_col_map <- c("A" = "#C8B8A2", "B" = "#A2B8C8", "C" = "#B8C8A2", "D" = "#C8A2B8")

# season_col_map <- c("A" = "#B5A99A", "B" = "#9AABB5", "C" = "#A9B59A", "D" = "#B59AAB")

# season_col_map <- c("A" = "#C9C0B5", "B" = "#B5BEC9", "C" = "#8A8A8A", "D" = "#5A5A5A")

season_col_map <- c("A" = "#B5A99A", "B" = "#9AABB5", "C" = "#A9B59A", "D" = "#5A5A5A")



strip_fills_x <- lapply(as.character(panel_seasons$Season), function(s)
  element_rect(fill = season_col_map[s], color = NA))

strip_texts_x <- lapply(as.character(panel_seasons$Season), function(s)
  element_text(color = "white", size = 5.5))

p_season_LALA <- ggplot() +
  geom_smooth(
    data = dat_mean2_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LT50, group = 1),
    color = "black", size = 0.5, method = "lm", formula = my.formula
  ) +
  geom_beeswarm(
    data = dat_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, col = Treatment, shape = CO2),
    stroke = 0.1, size = 1.2, cex = 1,
    priority = "ascending", alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    data = dat_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 2.4, color = "black"
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    data = dat_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, col = Treatment, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 2
  ) +
  facet_wrap2(
    ~ Date,
    nrow   = 8,
    strip  = strip_themed(
      background_x = strip_fills_x,
      text_x       = strip_texts_x
    )
  ) +
 scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(-2, 13),
      breaks = c(-1.8, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9, 11.25),
      labels = c("Amb", "+0°C", "+2.25°C", "+4.5°C", "+6.75°C", "+9°C", "+11.25°C"),
      guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")
      )+
    
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-50, 0),
    breaks = c(-50, -40, -30, -20, -10, 0),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  )+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2, size = 0.1)+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  labs(
    y = "Cold hardiness (°C)",
    x = expression(paste("Plot temperature (",Delta, italic("T"),", °C)"))
  ) +
     coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 12), ylim = c(-40, 5))+
  theme_bw(base_size = 5.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    strip.background  = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    strip.text        = element_text(size = 5.5, color = "black"),
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 5.5),
    axis.ticks        = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size=5.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "lines")
  )

p_season_LALA


# Year_LALA <- p_season_LALA +
#   stat_poly_eq(
#     data  = dat2_filt,
#     aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, group = Sequence,
#         label = after_stat(tolower(p.value.label)) ),
#     label.x = 0.25, label.y = 0.8, size = 2, formula = my.formula
#   ) +
#   stat_regline_equation(
#     data = dat2_filt,
#     aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, group = Sequence),
#     size = 2.5, label.x = 0.80, label.y = 0
#   )
# 
# Year_LALA



Year_LALA <- p_season_LALA +
  stat_poly_eq(
    data = dat2_filt, aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, group = Sequence,
                          label = after_stat(sprintf("y = %.1fx %+.1f\np = %s",
                                                     b_1, b_0,
                                                     ifelse(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001", 
                                                            sprintf("%.3f", p.value))))),
    formula = my.formula, output.type = "numeric", parse = FALSE, 
    label.x = 0.23, label.y = 0.92, hjust = 0, size = 1.8)

Year_LALA


# ggsave("Year_LALA_all_seasons_v24.pdf", plot = Year_LALA, width = 8, height = 9.0, units = "in", dpi = 300, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")




## PIMA
panel_seasons <- dat_filt %>%
  arrange(Season, Date) %>%
  distinct(Season, Date) %>%
  mutate(Season = factor(Season, levels = c("A","B","C","D")))

season_col_map <- c("A" = "#B5A99A", "B" = "#9AABB5", "C" = "#A9B59A", "D" = "#5A5A5A")



strip_fills_x <- lapply(as.character(panel_seasons$Season), function(s)
  element_rect(fill = season_col_map[s], color = NA))

strip_texts_x <- lapply(as.character(panel_seasons$Season), function(s)
  element_text(color = "white", size = 5.5))


keep_seq <- dat %>%
  filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "PIMA") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Treatment), !is.na(LTE)) %>%             # guard against NAs
  group_by(Sequence) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(n_trt = n_distinct(Treatment), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n_trt >= 4) %>%
  pull(Sequence)

# 2) Make filtered tibbles you’ll reuse in all layers
dat_filt      <- dat       %>% filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "PIMA", Sequence %in% keep_seq)
dat_mean2_filt<- dat_mean2 %>% filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "PIMA", Sequence %in% keep_seq)
dat2_filt     <- dat2      %>% filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "PIMA", Sequence %in% keep_seq)


dat_filt  <- dat_filt  %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_2m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, -1.8, Corrected_T_2m))

dat_mean2_filt <- dat_mean2_filt %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_2m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, -1.8, Corrected_T_2m))


# 3) Plot (unchanged aesthetics, but using the filtered data)
p_season_PIMA <- ggplot() +
  geom_smooth(
    data = dat_mean2_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LT50, group = 1),
    color = "black", size = 0.5, method = "lm", formula = my.formula
  ) +
  geom_beeswarm(
    data = dat_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, col = Treatment, shape = CO2),
    stroke = 0.1, size = 1.2, cex = 1,
    priority = "ascending", alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    data = dat_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 2.4, color = "black"
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    data = dat_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, col = Treatment, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 2
  ) +
  facet_wrap2(
    ~ Date,
    nrow   = 8,
    strip  = strip_themed(
      background_x = strip_fills_x,
      text_x       = strip_texts_x
    )
  ) +
 scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(-2, 13),
      breaks = c(-1.8, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9, 11.25),
      labels = c("Amb", "+0°C", "+2.25°C", "+4.5°C", "+6.75°C", "+9°C", "+11.25°C"),
      guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")
      )+
    
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-50, 0),
    breaks = c(-50, -40, -30, -20, -10, 0),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  )+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2, size = 0.1)+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  labs(
    y = "Cold hardiness (°C)",
    x = expression(paste("Plot temperature (",Delta, italic("T"),", °C)"))
  ) +
     coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 12), ylim = c(-40, 5))+
  theme_bw(base_size = 5.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    strip.background  = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    strip.text        = element_text(size = 5.5, color = "black"),
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 5.5),
    axis.ticks        = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size=5.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "lines")
  )

p_season_PIMA


Year_PIMA <- p_season_PIMA +
  stat_poly_eq(
    data = dat2_filt, aes(x = Corrected_T_2m, y = LTE, group = Sequence,
                          label = after_stat(sprintf("y = %.1fx %+.1f\np = %s",
                                                     b_1, b_0,
                                                     ifelse(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001", 
                                                            sprintf("%.3f", p.value))))),
    formula = my.formula, output.type = "numeric", parse = FALSE, 
    label.x = 0.23, label.y = 0.92, hjust = 0, size = 1.8)

Year_PIMA

# ggsave("Year_PIMA_all_seasons_v11.pdf", plot = Year_PIMA, width = 8, height = 9.0, units = "in", dpi = 300, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")


### Figure using 3 data points per season/year
```
