
```{r Supp Figure 10 and 11 ICH by collection CHCA & RHGR}

dat_un <- initial.ch_joined %>%
  filter(Species %in% c("CHCA", "RHGR")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Temperature = as.numeric(as.character(Treatment)),
    Corrected_T_0 = Corrected_T_0m  # or pick Corrected_T_2m / _0m explicitly
  )

dat_un_mean  <- dat_un %>%
  group_by(Season, Date, Treatment, Collection, Sequence, Temperature, Species, Corrected_T_0) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(LT50 = mean(LTE, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

dat_un2       <- dat_un      %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)
dat_un_mean2  <- dat_un_mean %>% filter(Temperature != -2.25)

axes_scales <- list(

      
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(-2, 9),
      breaks = c(-2, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9),
      labels = c("Amb", "0°C", "+2.25°C", "+4,5°C", "+6.75°C", "+9°C"),
      guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")
      ),
    
      
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-35, 0),
    breaks = c(-35, -25, -15, -5, 0),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  ),
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2, size = 0.1),
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000")),
  labs(
    y = "Cold hardiness (°C)",
    x = expression(paste("Plot temperature (",Delta, italic("T"),", °C)"))
  )+
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 9), ylim = c(-40, -2)) 
)

base_theme <- theme_bw(base_size = 5.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    strip.background  = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    strip.text        = element_text(size = 5.5, color = "black"),
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 5.5),
    axis.ticks        = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size=5.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "lines")
  )


# Choose multiple seasons at once

panel_seasons <- dat_filt %>%
  arrange(Season, Date) %>%
  distinct(Season, Date) %>%
  mutate(Season = factor(Season, levels = c("A","B","C","D")))

season_col_map <- c("A" = "#B5A99A", "B" = "#9AABB5", "C" = "#A9B59A", "D" = "#5A5A5A")



strip_fills_x <- lapply(as.character(panel_seasons$Season), function(s)
  element_rect(fill = season_col_map[s], color = NA))

strip_texts_x <- lapply(as.character(panel_seasons$Season), function(s)
  element_text(color = "white", size = 5.5))

season_pick <- c("A", "B", "C", "D")

keep_seq <- dat_un %>%
  filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "CHCA") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Treatment), !is.na(LTE)) %>%             # guard against NAs
  group_by(Sequence) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(n_trt = n_distinct(Treatment), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n_trt >= 3) %>%
  pull(Sequence)


# 2) Make filtered tibbles you’ll reuse in all layers

dat_filt      <- dat_un       %>% filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "CHCA", Sequence %in% keep_seq)
dat_mean2_filt<- dat_un_mean2 %>% filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "CHCA", Sequence %in% keep_seq)
dat2_filt     <- dat_un      %>% filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "CHCA", Sequence %in% keep_seq)



dat_filt  <- dat_filt  %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_0m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, -1.8, Corrected_T_0))

dat_mean2_filt <- dat_mean2_filt %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_0m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, -1.8, Corrected_T_0))

str(dat_filt)


p_season_CHCA <- ggplot() +
  geom_smooth(
    data = dat_mean2_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_0m, y = LT50, group = 1),
    color = "black", size = 0.5, method = "lm", formula = my.formula
  ) +
  geom_beeswarm(
    data = dat_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_0m, y = LTE, col = Treatment, shape = CO2),
    stroke = 0.1, size = 1.2, cex = 1,
    priority = "ascending", alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    data = dat_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_0m, y = LTE, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 2.4, color = "black"
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    data = dat_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_0m, y = LTE, col = Treatment, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 2
  ) +
  facet_wrap2(
    ~ Date,
    nrow   = 8,
    strip  = strip_themed(
      background_x = strip_fills_x,
      text_x       = strip_texts_x
    )
  ) +
 scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(-2, 13),
      breaks = c(-1.8, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9, 11.25),
      labels = c("Amb", "+0°C", "+2.25°C", "+4.5°C", "+6.75°C", "+9°C", "+11.25°C"),
      guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")
      )+
    
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-50, 0),
    breaks = c(-50, -40, -30, -20, -10, 0),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  )+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2, size = 0.1)+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  labs(
    y = "Cold hardiness (°C)",
    x = expression(paste("Plot temperature (",Delta, italic("T"),", °C)"))
  ) +
     coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 12), ylim = c(-40, 5))+
  theme_bw(base_size = 5.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    strip.background  = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    strip.text        = element_text(size = 5.5, color = "black"),
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 5.5),
    axis.ticks        = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size=5.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "lines")
  )

p_season_CHCA


Year_CHCA <- p_season_CHCA +
  stat_poly_eq(
    data = dat2_filt, aes(x = Corrected_T_0m, y = LTE, group = Sequence,
                          label = after_stat(sprintf("y = %.1fx %+.1f\np = %s",
                                                     b_1, b_0,
                                                     ifelse(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001", 
                                                            sprintf("%.3f", p.value))))),
    formula = my.formula, output.type = "numeric", parse = FALSE, 
    label.x = 0.23, label.y = 0.92, hjust = 0, size = 1.8)

Year_CHCA



# ggsave("Year_CHCA_all_seasons_v11.pdf", plot = Year_CHCA, width = 8, height = 9.0, units = "in", dpi = 50, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")
# 


panel_seasons <- dat_filt %>%
  arrange(Season, Date) %>%
  distinct(Season, Date) %>%
  mutate(Season = factor(Season, levels = c("A","B","C","D")))

season_col_map <- c("A" = "#B5A99A", "B" = "#9AABB5", "C" = "#A9B59A", "D" = "#5A5A5A")


strip_fills_x <- lapply(as.character(panel_seasons$Season), function(s)
  element_rect(fill = season_col_map[s], color = NA))

strip_texts_x <- lapply(as.character(panel_seasons$Season), function(s)
  element_text(color = "white", size = 5.5))

season_pick <- c("A", "B", "C", "D")

keep_seq <- dat_un %>%
  filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "RHGR") %>%
  filter(!is.na(Treatment), !is.na(LTE)) %>%             # guard against NAs
  group_by(Sequence) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(n_trt = n_distinct(Treatment), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n_trt >= 3) %>%
  pull(Sequence)


# 2) Make filtered tibbles you’ll reuse in all layers

dat_filt      <- dat_un       %>% filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "RHGR", Sequence %in% keep_seq)
dat_mean2_filt<- dat_un_mean2 %>% filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "RHGR", Sequence %in% keep_seq)
dat2_filt     <- dat_un      %>% filter(Season %in% season_pick, Species == "RHGR", Sequence %in% keep_seq)



dat_filt  <- dat_filt  %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_0m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, -1.8, Corrected_T_0))

dat_mean2_filt <- dat_mean2_filt %>%
  mutate(Corrected_T_0m = ifelse(Treatment == -2.25, -1.8, Corrected_T_0))

str(dat_filt)


p_season_RHGR <- ggplot() +
  geom_smooth(
    data = dat_mean2_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_0m, y = LT50, group = 1),
    color = "black", size = 0.5, method = "lm", formula = my.formula
  ) +
  geom_beeswarm(
    data = dat_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_0m, y = LTE, col = Treatment, shape = CO2),
    stroke = 0.1, size = 1.2, cex = 1,
    priority = "ascending", alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    data = dat_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_0m, y = LTE, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 2.4, color = "black"
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    data = dat_filt,
    aes(x = Corrected_T_0m, y = LTE, col = Treatment, shape = CO2),
    fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 2
  ) +
  facet_wrap2(
    ~ Date,
    nrow   = 8,
    strip  = strip_themed(
      background_x = strip_fills_x,
      text_x       = strip_texts_x
    )
  ) +
 scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(-2, 13),
      breaks = c(-1.8, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9, 11.25),
      labels = c("Amb", "+0°C", "+2.25°C", "+4.5°C", "+6.75°C", "+9°C", "+11.25°C"),
      guide = guide_axis(cap = "both")
      )+
    
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-50, 0),
    breaks = c(-50, -40, -30, -20, -10, 0),
    guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")
  )+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2, size = 0.1)+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000"))+
  labs(
    y = "Cold hardiness (°C)",
    x = expression(paste("Plot temperature (",Delta, italic("T"),", °C)"))
  ) +
     coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 12), ylim = c(-40, 5))+
  theme_bw(base_size = 5.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    strip.background  = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    strip.text        = element_text(size = 5.5, color = "black"),
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    panel.border      = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y       = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 5.5),
    axis.ticks        = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size=5.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.15, "lines")
  )

p_season_RHGR


Year_RHGR <- p_season_RHGR +
  stat_poly_eq(
    data = dat2_filt, aes(x = Corrected_T_0m, y = LTE, group = Sequence,
                          label = after_stat(sprintf("y = %.1fx %+.1f\np = %s",
                                                     b_1, b_0,
                                                     ifelse(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001", 
                                                            sprintf("%.3f", p.value))))),
    formula = my.formula, output.type = "numeric", parse = FALSE, 
    label.x = 0.23, label.y = 0.92, hjust = 0, size = 1.8)

Year_RHGR


# ggsave("Year_RHGR_all_seasons_v11.pdf", plot = Year_RHGR, width = 8, height = 9.0, units = "in", dpi = 50, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")


```


```{r Stats and Table S1}


# helper to format p-values
fmt_p <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p))  return("–")
  if (p < 0.001) return("<0.001")
  if (p < 0.01)  return("<0.01")
  if (p < 0.05)  return(paste0(round(p, 2)))
  return(as.character(round(p, 2)))
}


# LALA

df_LALA <- initial.ch %>%
  filter(Species == "LALA", !is.na(LTE), !is.na(Date),
         !is.na(Plot), Treatment != "-2.25") %>%
  mutate(Sequence = factor(Sequence), Plot = factor(Plot),
         CO2 = factor(CO2),
         T_Treat = as.numeric(as.character(Corrected_T)))

LTEdat_LALA <- df_LALA %>%
  transmute(Sequence, Plot, CO2, T_Treat, LTE) %>%
  na.omit()

LTEmean_LALA <- plyr::ddply(LTEdat_LALA, c("Sequence","Plot","T_Treat","CO2"), summarise,
                N = length(LTE), mean = mean(LTE), sd = sd(LTE), se = sd/sqrt(N))
names(LTEmean_LALA) <- c("Sequence","Plot","T_Treat","CO2","N","LTE","sd.LTE","se.LTE")

LTEmean2_LALA <- LTEmean_LALA %>%
  mutate(T_c = as.numeric(scale(T_Treat, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)))

m1_LALA <- lm(LTE ~ T_c * CO2 * Sequence,        data = LTEmean2_LALA)
m2_LALA <- lm(LTE ~ T_c + CO2 + T_c * Sequence,  data = LTEmean2_LALA)
m3_LALA <- lm(LTE ~ T_c * Sequence,               data = LTEmean2_LALA)

a1_LALA <- anova(m1_LALA)
a2_LALA <- anova(m2_LALA)
a3_LALA <- anova(m3_LALA)


# PIMA

df_PIMA <- initial.ch %>%
  filter(Species == "PIMA", !is.na(LTE), !is.na(Date),
         !is.na(Plot), Treatment != "-2.25") %>%
  mutate(Sequence = factor(Sequence), Plot = factor(Plot),
         CO2 = factor(CO2),
         T_Treat = as.numeric(as.character(Corrected_T)))

LTEdat_PIMA <- df_PIMA %>%
  transmute(Sequence, Plot, CO2, T_Treat, LTE) %>%
  na.omit()

LTEmean_PIMA <- plyr::ddply(LTEdat_PIMA, c("Sequence","Plot","T_Treat","CO2"), summarise,
                N = length(LTE), mean = mean(LTE), sd = sd(LTE), se = sd/sqrt(N))
names(LTEmean_PIMA) <- c("Sequence","Plot","T_Treat","CO2","N","LTE","sd.LTE","se.LTE")

LTEmean2_PIMA <- LTEmean_PIMA %>%
  mutate(T_c = as.numeric(scale(T_Treat, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)))

m1_PIMA <- lm(LTE ~ T_c * CO2 * Sequence,        data = LTEmean2_PIMA)
m2_PIMA <- lm(LTE ~ T_c + CO2 + T_c * Sequence,  data = LTEmean2_PIMA)
m3_PIMA <- lm(LTE ~ T_c * Sequence,               data = LTEmean2_PIMA)

a1_PIMA <- anova(m1_PIMA)
a2_PIMA <- anova(m2_PIMA)
a3_PIMA <- anova(m3_PIMA)


# CHCA

df_CHCA <- initial.ch %>%
  filter(Species == "CHCA", !is.na(LTE), !is.na(Date),
         !is.na(Plot), Treatment != "-2.25") %>%
  mutate(Sequence = factor(Sequence), Plot = factor(Plot),
         CO2 = factor(CO2),
         T_Treat = as.numeric(as.character(Corrected_T_0)))

LTEdat_CHCA <- df_CHCA %>%
  transmute(Sequence, Plot, CO2, T_Treat, LTE) %>%
  na.omit()

LTEmean_CHCA <- plyr::ddply(LTEdat_CHCA, c("Sequence","Plot","T_Treat","CO2"), summarise,
                N = length(LTE), mean = mean(LTE), sd = sd(LTE), se = sd/sqrt(N))
names(LTEmean_CHCA) <- c("Sequence","Plot","T_Treat","CO2","N","LTE","sd.LTE","se.LTE")

LTEmean2_CHCA <- LTEmean_CHCA %>%
  mutate(T_c = as.numeric(scale(T_Treat, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)))

m1_CHCA <- lm(LTE ~ T_c * CO2 * Sequence,        data = LTEmean2_CHCA)
m2_CHCA <- lm(LTE ~ T_c + CO2 + T_c * Sequence,  data = LTEmean2_CHCA)
m3_CHCA <- lm(LTE ~ T_c * Sequence,               data = LTEmean2_CHCA)

a1_CHCA <- anova(m1_CHCA)
a2_CHCA <- anova(m2_CHCA)
a3_CHCA <- anova(m3_CHCA)


# RHGR

df_RHGR <- initial.ch %>%
  filter(Species == "RHGR", !is.na(LTE), !is.na(Date),
         !is.na(Plot), Treatment != "-2.25") %>%
  mutate(Sequence = factor(Sequence), Plot = factor(Plot),
         CO2 = factor(CO2),
         T_Treat = as.numeric(as.character(Corrected_T_0)))

LTEdat_RHGR <- df_RHGR %>%
  transmute(Sequence, Plot, CO2, T_Treat, LTE) %>%
  na.omit()

LTEmean_RHGR <- plyr::ddply(LTEdat_RHGR, c("Sequence","Plot","T_Treat","CO2"), summarise,
                N = length(LTE), mean = mean(LTE), sd = sd(LTE), se = sd/sqrt(N))
names(LTEmean_RHGR) <- c("Sequence","Plot","T_Treat","CO2","N","LTE","sd.LTE","se.LTE")

LTEmean2_RHGR <- LTEmean_RHGR %>%
  mutate(T_c = as.numeric(scale(T_Treat, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)))

m1_RHGR <- lm(LTE ~ T_c * CO2 * Sequence,        data = LTEmean2_RHGR)
m2_RHGR <- lm(LTE ~ T_c + CO2 + T_c * Sequence,  data = LTEmean2_RHGR)
m3_RHGR <- lm(LTE ~ T_c * Sequence,               data = LTEmean2_RHGR)

a1_RHGR <- anova(m1_RHGR)
a2_RHGR <- anova(m2_RHGR)
a3_RHGR <- anova(m3_RHGR)


# Building the summary table


# Pull p-value from an anova table by partial term name match
p <- function(anova_obj, term) {
  rn <- rownames(anova_obj)
  hit <- rn[grepl(term, rn, fixed = TRUE)]
  if (length(hit) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  anova_obj[hit[1], "Pr(>F)"]
}

model_table <- data.frame(
  Species    = c("LALA","LALA","LALA",
                 "PIMA","PIMA","PIMA",
                 "CHCA","CHCA","CHCA",
                 "RHGR","RHGR","RHGR"),
  Model      = rep(c("m_lm1","m_lm2","m_lm3"), 4),

  Treatment  = c(
    fmt_p(p(a1_LALA,"T_c")), fmt_p(p(a2_LALA,"T_c")), fmt_p(p(a3_LALA,"T_c")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_PIMA,"T_c")), fmt_p(p(a2_PIMA,"T_c")), fmt_p(p(a3_PIMA,"T_c")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_CHCA,"T_c")), fmt_p(p(a2_CHCA,"T_c")), fmt_p(p(a3_CHCA,"T_c")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_RHGR,"T_c")), fmt_p(p(a2_RHGR,"T_c")), fmt_p(p(a3_RHGR,"T_c"))
  ),

  CO2        = c(
    fmt_p(p(a1_LALA,"CO2")), fmt_p(p(a2_LALA,"CO2")), fmt_p(p(a3_LALA,"CO2")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_PIMA,"CO2")), fmt_p(p(a2_PIMA,"CO2")), fmt_p(p(a3_PIMA,"CO2")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_CHCA,"CO2")), fmt_p(p(a2_CHCA,"CO2")), fmt_p(p(a3_CHCA,"CO2")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_RHGR,"CO2")), fmt_p(p(a2_RHGR,"CO2")), fmt_p(p(a3_RHGR,"CO2"))
  ),

  Treat_CO2  = c(
    fmt_p(p(a1_LALA,"T_c:CO2")), fmt_p(p(a2_LALA,"T_c:CO2")), fmt_p(p(a3_LALA,"T_c:CO2")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_PIMA,"T_c:CO2")), fmt_p(p(a2_PIMA,"T_c:CO2")), fmt_p(p(a3_PIMA,"T_c:CO2")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_CHCA,"T_c:CO2")), fmt_p(p(a2_CHCA,"T_c:CO2")), fmt_p(p(a3_CHCA,"T_c:CO2")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_RHGR,"T_c:CO2")), fmt_p(p(a2_RHGR,"T_c:CO2")), fmt_p(p(a3_RHGR,"T_c:CO2"))
  ),

  Collection = c(
    fmt_p(p(a1_LALA,"Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_LALA,"Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_LALA,"Sequence")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_PIMA,"Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_PIMA,"Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_PIMA,"Sequence")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_CHCA,"Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_CHCA,"Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_CHCA,"Sequence")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_RHGR,"Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_RHGR,"Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_RHGR,"Sequence"))
  ),

  Treat_Coll = c(
    fmt_p(p(a1_LALA,"T_c:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_LALA,"T_c:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_LALA,"T_c:Sequence")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_PIMA,"T_c:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_PIMA,"T_c:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_PIMA,"T_c:Sequence")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_CHCA,"T_c:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_CHCA,"T_c:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_CHCA,"T_c:Sequence")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_RHGR,"T_c:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_RHGR,"T_c:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_RHGR,"T_c:Sequence"))
  ),

  CO2_Coll   = c(
    fmt_p(p(a1_LALA,"CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_LALA,"CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_LALA,"CO2:Sequence")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_PIMA,"CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_PIMA,"CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_PIMA,"CO2:Sequence")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_CHCA,"CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_CHCA,"CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_CHCA,"CO2:Sequence")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_RHGR,"CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_RHGR,"CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_RHGR,"CO2:Sequence"))
  ),

  Three_way  = c(
    fmt_p(p(a1_LALA,"T_c:CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_LALA,"T_c:CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_LALA,"T_c:CO2:Sequence")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_PIMA,"T_c:CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_PIMA,"T_c:CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_PIMA,"T_c:CO2:Sequence")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_CHCA,"T_c:CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_CHCA,"T_c:CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_CHCA,"T_c:CO2:Sequence")),
    fmt_p(p(a1_RHGR,"T_c:CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a2_RHGR,"T_c:CO2:Sequence")), fmt_p(p(a3_RHGR,"T_c:CO2:Sequence"))
  ),

  Adj_R2     = c(
    round(summary(m1_LALA)$adj.r.squared, 2), round(summary(m2_LALA)$adj.r.squared, 2), round(summary(m3_LALA)$adj.r.squared, 2),
    round(summary(m1_PIMA)$adj.r.squared, 2), round(summary(m2_PIMA)$adj.r.squared, 2), round(summary(m3_PIMA)$adj.r.squared, 2),
    round(summary(m1_CHCA)$adj.r.squared, 2), round(summary(m2_CHCA)$adj.r.squared, 2), round(summary(m3_CHCA)$adj.r.squared, 2),
    round(summary(m1_RHGR)$adj.r.squared, 2), round(summary(m2_RHGR)$adj.r.squared, 2), round(summary(m3_RHGR)$adj.r.squared, 2)
  ),

  AIC        = c(
    round(AIC(m1_LALA), 2), round(AIC(m2_LALA), 2), round(AIC(m3_LALA), 2),
    round(AIC(m1_PIMA), 2), round(AIC(m2_PIMA), 2), round(AIC(m3_PIMA), 2),
    round(AIC(m1_CHCA), 2), round(AIC(m2_CHCA), 2), round(AIC(m3_CHCA), 2),
    round(AIC(m1_RHGR), 2), round(AIC(m2_RHGR), 2), round(AIC(m3_RHGR), 2)
  ),

  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

print(model_table)

# Export to CSV
# write.csv(model_table, "model_table_all_species2.csv", row.names = FALSE)


```



```{r Distribution of winter temperatures ON JAN 17, 2024}

# Mean winter temperature at 2m

# Subset winter months: December, January, February
winter_2m <- wdat_2b %>% filter(Month %in% c(1))
winter_2mB <- winter_2m %>% filter(Day %in% c(17))
winter_2mC <- winter_2mB %>% filter(Year %in% c(2024))

# Mean winter temperature per plot and treatment
mean_winter_2m <- winter_2mC %>%
  group_by(Plot, Treatment) %>%
  summarise(Mean_Temp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(Sensor_Height = "2m")

mean_winter_2mB <- winter_2mC %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarise(Mean_Temp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(Sensor_Height = "2m")

mean_winter_2m$Treatment <- factor(
  mean_winter_2m$Treatment,
  levels = c(-2.25, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9),
  labels = c("Amb", "0°C", "+2.25°C", "+4.5°C", "+6.75°C", "+9°C"))


winter_2m_fig <- ggplot(data = mean_winter_2m, 
                        aes(x = Treatment, y = Mean_Temp, fill = Treatment, color=Treatment)) +
 
  geom_point(stat="summary", size=3)+
  
   # geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.4, rel_min_height = 0.01, color = "white") +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000")) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(guide = guide_axis(theme = NULL, minor.ticks = F, cap = "both")) +


  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-25,-5), breaks=seq(-25,-5,5),
                   guide = guide_axis(theme = NULL, minor.ticks = T, cap = "both"))+

  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "Mean Temperatures (°C) \nat 2m on Jan 17, 2024",
    y = "Treatment"
  ) +
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 7) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, 'lines')
  )

winter_2m_fig


# ggsave("winter_2m_fig_v6.pdf", plot=winter_2m_fig   , width=2.3, height=3, units ="in", bg = "transparent", dpi = 600, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")


# Mean winter temperature at 0m

winter_0m <- wdat_0b %>% filter(Month %in% c(1))
winter_0mB <- winter_0m %>% filter(Day %in% c(17))
winter_0mC <- winter_0mB %>% filter(Year %in% c(2024))

mean_winter_0m <- winter_0mC %>%
  group_by(Plot, Treatment) %>%
  summarise(Mean_Temp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(Sensor_Height = "0m")

mean_winter_0mB <- winter_0mC %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarise(Mean_Temp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(Sensor_Height = "0m")

mean_winter_0m$Treatment <- factor(
  mean_winter_0m$Treatment,
  levels = c(-2.25, 0, 2.25, 4.5, 6.75, 9),
  labels = c("Amb", "0°C", "+2.25°C", "+4.5°C", "+6.75°C", "+9°C"))


winter_0m_fig <- ggplot(data = mean_winter_0m, 
                        aes(x = Treatment, y = Mean_Temp, fill = Treatment, color=Treatment)) +
 
  geom_point(stat="summary", size=3)+
  
   # geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.4, rel_min_height = 0.01, color = "white") +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000")) +
  

  scale_x_discrete(guide = guide_axis(theme = NULL, minor.ticks = F, cap = "both")) +


  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-25,-5), breaks=seq(-25,-5,5),
                   guide = guide_axis(theme = NULL, minor.ticks = T, cap = "both"))+

  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "Mean Temperatures (°C) \nat 0m on Jan 17, 2024",
    y = "Treatment"
  ) +
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 7) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, 'lines')
  )

winter_0m_fig


winter_17Jan_fig <- ggplot() +
 
  geom_point(data = mean_winter_0m,
             aes(x = Treatment, y = Mean_Temp, fill = Treatment, color=Treatment, shape=Sensor_Height),
             stat="summary", size=3)+
  
  geom_point(data = mean_winter_2m,
             aes(x = Treatment, y = Mean_Temp, fill = Treatment, color=Treatment, shape=Sensor_Height),
             stat="summary", size=3)+
  
   # geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.4, rel_min_height = 0.01, color = "white") +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#333366", "#009999", "#99CC33", "#FFCC00", "#CC3366", "#990000")) +
  

  scale_x_discrete(guide = guide_axis(theme = NULL, minor.ticks = F, cap = "both")) +


  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-25,-5), breaks=seq(-25,-5,5),
                   guide = guide_axis(theme = NULL, minor.ticks = T, cap = "both"))+

  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "Treatment",
    y = "Mean Temperature (°C) \non Jan 17, 2024"
  ) +
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 7) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "#CCCCCC"),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.line.y = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.25, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.3, 'lines')
  )

winter_17Jan_fig

winter_2m_fig+winter_0m_fig

# ggsave("winter_0m_fig_v6.pdf", plot=winter_0m_fig   , width=2.3, height=3, units ="in", bg = "transparent", dpi = 600, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")


```


```{r Control freeze test}

ct_fr=read.csv("/Users/FranCampos/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Cold_hardiness_data_SPRUCE/Control_Freeze_SPR_051326.csv")

str(ct_fr)

ct_fr %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(mean_LTE = round(mean(LTE, na.rm = TRUE), 2))



ct_fr_fig <- ggplot(data = ct_fr, aes(x = as.factor(Species), y = LTE, 
                          fill = as.factor(Species), 
                          color = as.factor(Species))) +
  
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, linewidth = 0.3,
               outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7, color="gray20") +
  
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 1.4, alpha = 0.6, shape=21, color="gray20") +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c("LALA" = "#d95f02", "PIMA" = "#66a61e")) +
  
  facet_wrap(.~Species, scales="free", nrow=2)+
  
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  
  
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-28,-22, 2),
                     guide  = guide_axis(cap = "both")) +

  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-28, -22))+
  
  scale_x_discrete(guide = guide_axis(cap = "both"))+  
  
  theme_bw(base_size = 6) +
theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    legend.key.size   = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    panel.grid        = element_blank(),
    # panel.border      = element_blank(),
    strip.background  = element_rect(fill = "#F0F0F0", color = "grey30"),
    strip.text        = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x.bottom = element_line(linewidth = 0.25, color = "grey30"),  # explicit bottom
    axis.line.y       = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x       = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x      = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y      = element_line(linewidth = 0.25, color = "grey30"),  # only y ticks
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0.1, "lines"),
    axis.text.y       = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 6),
    panel.spacing     = unit(2.0, "lines")
  )

ct_fr_fig


# ggsave("ct_fr_fig_v2.pdf", plot=ct_fr_fig   , width=1.2, height=4.2, units ="in", bg = "transparent", dpi = 600, path="~/Desktop/PhD/WISC/Manuscripts/Exploring cold hardiness and dormancy/Exploring_CH_Figures")



```
